FIT-INBOUND-01.overview: An 11-day wildlife adventure through India’s premier national parks, featuring tiger safaris, jungle treks, and cultural highlights in Delhi and Mumbai. Explore dense forests, spot rare wildlife, and experience the thrill of India’s Big Five in protected reserves.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, exploring nearby markets or relaxing after your journey.

days.title: Delhi sightseeing
days.description: Visit the historic Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and Humayun’s Tomb. In the afternoon, explore Chandni Chowk for local cuisine and shopping.

days.title: Fly to Jabalpur – Bandhavgarh
days.description: Fly to Jabalpur and drive to Bandhavgarh National Park. Enjoy a late afternoon safari to spot tigers and other wildlife in the park.

days.title: Bandhavgarh jungle safaris
days.description: Embark on two morning and evening safaris in Bandhavgarh, known for its high tiger density. Visit the ancient Bandhavgarh Fort for panoramic views.

days.title: Bandhavgarh to Kanha
days.description: Drive to Kanha National Park, stopping at the scenic Bamarha meadows. Enjoy a short safari upon arrival to acclimate to the park.

days.title: Kanha jungle safaris
days.description: Spend the day on jeep safaris in Kanha, famous for its barasingha (swamp deer) and tiger sightings. Visit the Kanha Museum to learn about the park’s ecology.

days.title: Kanha to Pench
days.description: Travel to Pench National Park, stopping at the historic Sitabuldi Fort in Nagpur. Enjoy a relaxed evening at the lodge.

days.title: Pench jungle safaris
days.description: Explore Pench’s dense forests on safaris, known for its leopards and wild dogs. Visit the Pench River, a key water source for wildlife.

days.title: Pench to Tadoba
days.description: Drive to Tadoba Andhari Tiger Reserve, stopping at Chandrapur for lunch. Enjoy a night safari to spot nocturnal wildlife.

days.title: Tadoba jungle safaris
days.description: Spend the day on safaris in Tadoba, one of India’s best tiger reserves. Visit the Tadoba Lake for birdwatching and scenic views.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Drive to Nagpur for your flight to Mumbai. Spend your last evening exploring Marine Drive or local markets before departure.

FIT-INBOUND-02.overview: Explore the ancient rock-cut caves of Maharashtra, showcasing stunning Buddhist, Hindu, and Jain architecture. This 6-day tour covers Nashik's historic sites and the UNESCO-listed Ajanta and Ellora caves near Aurangabad.

days.title: Arrival in Nashik
days.description: Arrive in Nashik, a historic city known for its vineyards and religious significance. Check into your hotel and relax before exploring the local markets and temples.

days.title: Nashik – Panchavati & Sula Vineyards
days.description: Visit Panchavati, a sacred area with temples like Kalaram and Muktidham. Later, tour Sula Vineyards for wine tasting and vineyard insights.

days.title: Nashik to Aurangabad – Travel Day
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad, a city steeped in Mughal history. En route, stop at Daulatabad Fort for panoramic views and medieval architecture.

days.title: Ajanta Caves – UNESCO Marvel
days.description: Explore the 2nd-century Ajanta Caves, featuring intricate Buddhist murals and carvings. Spend the day admiring the rock-cut chaityas and viharas.

days.title: Ellora Caves – Kailash Temple
days.description: Discover the Ellora Caves, a UNESCO site with 34 caves spanning Hindu, Buddhist, and Jain traditions. Marvel at the monolithic Kailash Temple, a masterpiece of ancient engineering.

days.title: Departure from Aurangabad
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Aurangabad airport or railway station for departure. Reflect on the journey through Maharashtra's cave heritage.

FIT-INBOUND-03.overview: This 7-day tribal tour of eastern India explores the rich cultural heritage and indigenous traditions of Odisha’s tribal communities. The journey covers sacred sites, tribal villages, and scenic landscapes from Bhubaneshwar to remote regions near the Andhra Pradesh border.

days.title: Arrival in Bhubaneshwar
days.description: Arrive at Bhubaneshwar airport or railway station and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening exploring the ancient Lingaraj Temple, a 7th-century Shiva shrine, and enjoy Odia cuisine at a local restaurant.

days.title: Bhubaneshwar city tour
days.description: Visit the Dhauli Shanti Stupa, a Buddhist monument marking the site of Ashoka’s conversion after the Kalinga War. Explore the Odisha State Museum to learn about tribal artifacts and regional history.

days.title: Bhubaneshwar to Gopalpur
days.description: Travel to Gopalpur-on-Sea, a serene coastal town, and relax on its golden beaches. Visit the nearby Taratarini Temple, a Shakti Peetha perched on a hill overlooking the Rushikulya River.

days.title: Gopalpur to Raygada
days.description: Drive to Raygada, a gateway to Odisha’s tribal heartland, and visit the tribal market to observe daily life and crafts. Meet local Dongria Kondh or Saura tribes to learn about their unique traditions and sustainable farming.

days.title: Raygada tribal village visit
days.description: Spend the day in a remote tribal village near Raygada, participating in cultural exchanges and observing traditional dance performances. Learn about indigenous medicinal plants from local healers.

days.title: Raygada to Jeypore
days.description: Travel to Jeypore, a historic town surrounded by lush forests, and visit the Jeypore Palace. Explore the weekly tribal market to purchase handmade crafts like Dokra metalwork and Saura paintings.

days.title: Departure from Jeypore
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Jeypore airport or railway station for your onward journey. Reflect on the tribal experiences and cultural insights gained during the tour.

FIT-INBOUND-04.overview: A rejuvenating 8-day Ayurveda and wellness retreat in Kerala, India. Immerse yourself in traditional Ayurvedic therapies, yoga, meditation, and natural healing practices amidst serene backwaters and lush landscapes.

days.title: Arrival in Kochi
days.description: Arrive at Kochi International Airport (COK). Transfer to Carnoustie Ayurveda & Wellness resort. Check-in, relax, and enjoy a welcome Ayurvedic drink. Evening free to explore local surroundings.

days.title: Ayurvedic Consultation & Relaxation
days.description: Morning: Ayurvedic consultation and personalized wellness assessment. Afternoon: Begin with gentle Abhyanga (Ayurvedic oil massage). Evening: Guided meditation session.

days.title: Therapeutic Treatments & Yoga
days.description: Morning: Yoga session tailored to your dosha. Afternoon: Panchakarma therapy session (as per consultation). Evening: Herbal steam bath and rest.

days.title: Backwaters & Detoxification
days.description: Morning: Boat ride through Kerala backwaters. Afternoon: Detoxifying treatments including Udwarthanam (herbal powder massage). Evening: Ayurvedic cooking class.

days.title: Deep Healing & Meditation
days.description: Morning: Shirodhara (oil flow on forehead) therapy. Afternoon: Silent meditation and Pranayama session. Evening: Sound healing therapy.

days.title: Nature & Rejuvenation
days.description: Morning: Nature walk and herbal garden tour. Afternoon: Rejuvenating facial and body treatment. Evening: Sunset yoga by the resort.

days.title: Final Wellness Session
days.description: Morning: Final Ayurvedic massage and consultation. Afternoon: Free time for journaling or personal reflection. Evening: Farewell dinner with traditional Kerala cuisine.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Morning: Light breakfast and check-out. Transfer to Kochi Airport for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-06.overview: This 8-day tour explores the cultural and natural highlights of Nepal, starting in Kathmandu with its historic temples, then venturing into the wildlife-rich Chitwan National Park, and ending with the scenic beauty of Pokhara and its lakes. The journey blends heritage, adventure, and relaxation in one of the world's most diverse countries.

days.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
days.description: Arrive at Tribhuvan International Airport and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening exploring nearby Thamel, a vibrant hub for shopping and dining, to acclimate to the city's rhythm.

days.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing Tour
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Durbar Square, Swayambhunath Stupa (Monkey Temple), and Pashupatinath Temple. Experience the blend of Newari architecture and spiritual traditions in the heart of the city.

days.title: Fly to Chitwan National Park
days.description: Take a short flight to Bharatpur and drive to Chitwan National Park. Enjoy a welcome drink and orientation before a gentle jungle walk to spot local birds and wildlife.

days.title: Chitwan Jungle Safari
days.description: Embark on an early morning jeep safari to spot one-horned rhinos, elephants, and crocodiles. In the afternoon, visit a Tharu village to learn about indigenous culture and traditions.

days.title: Chitwan to Pokhara Flight
days.description: Fly from Chitwan to Pokhara, a scenic gateway to the Annapurna range. Relax by Phewa Lake and enjoy views of the Himalayas from your hotel balcony.

days.title: Pokhara Lakeside Exploration
days.description: Visit Davis Falls and the World Peace Pagoda for panoramic lake and mountain views. Take a boat ride on Phewa Lake and explore the colorful markets of Lakeside.

days.title: Pokhara Adventure Day
days.description: Choose between paragliding, zip-lining, or a short trek to Sarangkot for sunrise views over the Annapurna range. Alternatively, visit the International Mountain Museum.

days.title: Departure from Kathmandu
days.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey. If time permits, pick up last-minute souvenirs from Thamel before heading home.

FIT-INBOUND-11.overview: An 8-day journey through the highlights of Nepal, starting in the vibrant capital of Kathmandu, exploring the wildlife and culture of Chitwan, and ending with the breathtaking views and adventure of Pokhara.

days.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
days.description: Arrive in Kathmandu, the capital of Nepal. Transfer to your hotel and rest after your journey. In the evening, explore the nearby Thamel area for dinner and shopping.

days.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
days.description: Full-day sightseeing tour covering UNESCO World Heritage Sites: Swayambhunath Stupa (Monkey Temple), Pashupatinath Temple, Boudhanath Stupa, and Kathmandu Durbar Square.

days.title: Travel to Chitwan National Park
days.description: Morning drive to Chitwan National Park (approx. 5-6 hours). Afternoon activities include a jungle walk and village tour to learn about local Tharu culture. Evening cultural program with Tharu dance and music.

days.title: Chitwan National Park Safari
days.description: Full-day jungle activities: jeep safari, canoe ride, bird watching, and visit to the Elephant Breeding Center. Evening at leisure or optional nature walk.

days.title: Travel to Pokhara
days.description: Morning drive to Pokhara (approx. 5-6 hours). Afternoon free to explore Lakeside, visit the World Peace Pagoda, or relax by Phewa Lake.

days.title: Pokhara Adventure & Scenic Views
days.description: Morning paragliding or zip-lining adventure (optional). Afternoon visit to Davis Falls and Gupteswor Mahadev Cave. Evening boat ride on Phewa Lake with views of the Annapurna range.

days.title: Pokhara Exploration & Relaxation
days.description: Morning hike to Sarangkot for sunrise views over the Himalayas. Free time in the afternoon for shopping or leisure activities. Evening farewell dinner with cultural show.

days.title: Departure from Pokhara
days.description: Morning at leisure. Transfer to Pokhara airport for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-12.overview: A 7-day journey through Sri Lanka's cultural heartland and scenic highlands, ending with relaxation on the golden beaches of Bentota. Explore ancient temples, lush tea plantations, and wildlife sanctuaries.

days.title: Arrival in Kandy
days.description: Arrive at Bandaranaike International Airport (CMB). Transfer to Kandy (2.5-hour drive). Check-in at a heritage hotel. Evening visit to the Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic. Cultural dance performance at Kandy Cultural Centre.

days.title: Kandy Exploration
days.description: Morning visit to the Kandy Lake and Udawatta Kele Sanctuary. Afternoon tour of the National Museum and a traditional gem museum. Evening stroll along the lakefront and shopping for souvenirs at the Kandy Market.

days.title: Kandy to Nuwara Eliya
days.description: Morning drive to Nuwara Eliya (4-hour scenic journey through tea plantations). Stop at a tea factory for a tasting tour. Explore Gregory Lake, Victoria Park, and the charming colonial architecture. Visit a strawberry farm in the evening.

days.title: Nuwara Eliya Highlights
days.description: Morning visit to Horton Plains National Park (UNESCO site) and World's End for sunrise views. Afternoon tour of the Hakgala Botanical Gardens and a visit to a local tea plantation worker's home. Optional horseback riding at the Nuwara Eliya Racecourse.

days.title: Nuwara Eliya to Bentota
days.description: Morning drive to Bentota (5-hour journey via the scenic hill country and coastal route). Stop at the Pinnawala Elephant Orphanage for an interactive experience with rescued elephants. Evening at leisure by the beach.

days.title: Bentota Relaxation & Water Sports
days.description: Full day at Bentota Beach. Enjoy water sports like jet skiing, windsurfing, or a leisurely boat ride on the Bentota River. Visit the Mask Museum to learn about traditional Sri Lankan masks. Sunset dolphin watching cruise (seasonal).

days.title: Departure from Bentota
days.description: Morning free for last-minute beach time or a visit to the nearby Madu River mangrove lagoon for a boat safari. Transfer to Bandaranaike International Airport (CMB) for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-13.overview: A 7-day cultural and natural journey through the heart of India, exploring the historic forts of Gwalior, the UNESCO-listed temples of Khajuraho, the serene Panna National Park, and the scenic beauty of Jabalpur.

days.title: Arrival in Gwalior
days.description: Arrive in Gwalior, a historic city known for its grand forts and palaces. Check into your hotel and explore the local markets. Evening visit to the Gwalior Fort to witness the light and sound show.

days.title: Gwalior to Khajuraho
days.description: Morning drive to Khajuraho (approx. 5-6 hours). Visit the Western Group of Temples, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, known for their intricate carvings and architectural brilliance. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Exploring Khajuraho
days.description: Full day dedicated to exploring the Eastern and Southern Groups of Khajuraho Temples. Visit the Khajuraho Dance Festival if it aligns with your travel dates. Evening free to relax.

days.title: Khajuraho to Panna
days.description: Morning drive to Panna (approx. 3 hours). Afternoon visit to Panna National Park for a safari to spot tigers, leopards, and other wildlife. Evening at the Ken River for a peaceful boat ride.

days.title: Panna National Park
days.description: Full day safari in Panna National Park, including a visit to Pandava Falls and the ancient Panna Mahadev Temple. Enjoy the natural beauty and wildlife of the region.

days.title: Panna to Jabalpur
days.description: Morning drive to Jabalpur (approx. 5-6 hours). En route, visit the Raneh Falls and the ancient Dhubela Museum. Evening at leisure in Jabalpur.

days.title: Departure from Jabalpur
days.description: Morning at leisure to explore local attractions like the Marble Rocks or Bhedaghat Falls. Afternoon transfer to Jabalpur airport/railway station for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-14.overview: A 10-day journey through the scenic landscapes and cultural richness of North East India, covering wildlife, waterfalls, tea gardens, and national parks.

days.title: Arrival in Guwahati
days.description: Arrive at Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport in Guwahati. Transfer to Manas (approx. 3.5 hours drive). Check-in at a wildlife resort near Manas National Park. Relax and explore the local surroundings.

days.title: Manas National Park
days.description: Full-day safari in Manas National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Spot Bengal tigers, one-horned rhinos, elephants, and diverse birdlife. Evening visit to the Manas River for a serene experience.

days.title: Manas to Shillong
days.description: Morning drive to Shillong (approx. 6 hours). En route, visit the famous Umiam Lake. Arrive in Shillong, the 'Scotland of the East,' and check-in at a hotel. Explore local markets and the vibrant city life.

days.title: Shillong Sightseeing
days.description: Visit Elephant Falls, Shillong Peak for panoramic views, and the Don Bosco Museum. Explore the local cafes and try traditional Khasi cuisine. Evening stroll at the Police Bazaar.

days.title: Shillong to Cherrapunjee
days.description: Drive to Cherrapunjee (approx. 2.5 hours). Visit the living root bridges, Nohkalikai Falls, and Mawsmai Caves. Witness the breathtaking views of the Khasi Hills and the plains below.

days.title: Cherrapunjee Exploration
days.description: Full-day exploration of Cherrapunjee’s natural wonders. Visit the double-decker living root bridge, Seven Sisters Falls, and the Mawsmai Viewpoint. Enjoy the lush greenery and unique geological formations.

days.title: Cherrapunjee to Nameri
days.description: Drive to Nameri National Park (approx. 5 hours). Check-in at a jungle lodge. Evening visit to the Jia Bhoroli River for a relaxed riverside experience.

days.title: Nameri National Park
days.description: Morning jeep safari or river rafting in Nameri National Park. Spot elephants, tigers, and a variety of birds. Afternoon visit to the nearby tea gardens for a cultural experience.

days.title: Nameri to Kaziranga
days.description: Drive to Kaziranga National Park (approx. 4 hours). Check-in at a wildlife resort. Evening visit to the nearby tea estate for a guided tour.

days.title: Departure from Kaziranga
days.description: Morning jeep safari in Kaziranga National Park to spot the one-horned rhinoceros, elephants, and other wildlife. Post-safari, transfer to Guwahati Airport for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-15.overview: A 6-day cultural and spiritual journey through the heart of Uttar Pradesh, exploring the sacred cities of Varanasi, Prayagraj, Ayodhya, and Lucknow. Experience ancient traditions, vibrant ghats, historic temples, and royal heritage.

days.title: Arrival in Varanasi
days.description: Arrive in Varanasi, one of the world's oldest living cities. Check into your hotel and rest. In the evening, attend the Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat, a mesmerizing spiritual ceremony. Explore the nearby streets and enjoy a boat ride on the Ganges at sunset.

days.title: Varanasi – Spiritual Exploration
days.description: Morning visit to Kashi Vishwanath Temple, one of Hinduism's most sacred shrines. Explore the labyrinthine alleys of the old city. Afternoon visit to Sarnath, a significant Buddhist pilgrimage site. Evening free for local exploration or optional cultural programs.

days.title: Varanasi to Prayagraj – Sangam Confluence
days.description: Morning travel to Prayagraj (approx. 3.5 hours). Visit Triveni Sangam, the sacred confluence of the Ganges, Yamuna, and mythical Saraswati rivers. Participate in rituals or take a boat ride to the confluence point. Evening visit to Allahabad Fort and Anand Bhavan.

days.title: Prayagraj to Ayodhya – Ram Janmabhoomi Pilgrimage
days.description: Morning travel to Ayodhya (approx. 5 hours). Visit the newly constructed Ram Mandir and other significant sites like Hanuman Garhi and Kanak Bhawan. Evening attend aarti at Sarayu River ghats. Explore the city's spiritual ambiance.

days.title: Ayodhya to Lucknow – Heritage & Culture
days.description: Morning travel to Lucknow (approx. 6 hours). Afternoon visit to Rumi Darwaza, Bara Imambara, and Chota Imambara. Evening attend a Lucknowi Kathak dance performance or enjoy local Awadhi cuisine at a heritage restaurant.

days.title: Departure from Lucknow
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or visiting the British Residency. Check out and transfer to the airport for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-16.overview: An 8-day journey through Bhutan's most iconic destinations, starting from the bustling border town of Phuentsholing, exploring the cultural heart of Thimphu, the scenic beauty of Punakha, and the spiritual heritage of Paro, before returning to Phuentsholing.

days.title: Arrival in Phuentsholing
days.description: Arrive at Phuentsholing, the gateway to Bhutan. Complete immigration formalities and transfer to Thimphu (3.5 hours drive). Check-in at a hotel in Thimphu. Visit the National Memorial Chorten, Buddha Dordenma, and Tashi Chhodzong. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Thimphu Exploration
days.description: Morning visit to the Folk Heritage Museum and the Textile Museum. Afternoon explore the Weekend Market (if applicable) and the Institute of Zorig Chusum (School of Arts and Crafts). Evening stroll around the city.

days.title: Thimphu to Punakha
days.description: Drive to Punakha (3 hours). Visit the majestic Punakha Dzong, located at the confluence of the Pho and Mo Chhu rivers. Afternoon explore Chimi Lhakhang, the temple of fertility. Overnight in Punakha.

days.title: Punakha Valley
days.description: Morning hike to Khamsum Yulley Namgyal Chorten. Afternoon visit to the Royal Botanical Garden at Lamperi. Optional activities include river rafting or a visit to the Mothithang Heritage Museum. Overnight in Punakha.

days.title: Punakha to Paro
days.description: Drive to Paro (5-6 hours). En route, visit the Dochula Pass (if open) and the beautiful Druk Wangyal Lhakhang. Check-in at a hotel in Paro. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Paro Exploration
days.description: Morning hike to the iconic Tiger's Nest Monastery (Paro Taktsang). Afternoon visit to the Paro Dzong and the National Museum. Evening explore the local market and enjoy a cultural performance if available.

days.title: Paro to Phuentsholing
days.description: Morning drive back to Phuentsholing (6 hours). Afternoon at leisure to explore the town or visit nearby attractions like the Karbandi Monastery. Overnight in Phuentsholing.

days.title: Departure from Phuentsholing
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the Phuentsholing border for departure formalities. End of the tour.

FIT-INBOUND-17.overview: A 15-day immersive Ayurvedic retreat combining Panchakarma detoxification with mindfulness practices at Dharana, set against the serene hills of Lonavala. This holistic journey blends traditional healing therapies, yoga, and meditation to rejuvenate mind, body, and spirit.

days.title: Arrival in Lonavala
days.description: Arrive at Lonavala railway station or Pune airport and transfer to the retreat center. Check-in, settle into your tranquil accommodation, and enjoy a welcome Ayurvedic tea ceremony to begin your detox journey.

days.title: Orientation & Dosha Assessment
days.description: Participate in an initial consultation with Ayurvedic doctors to determine your dosha (body constitution). Enjoy a light herbal lunch followed by a guided tour of the retreat facilities and evening meditation session.

days.title: Introduction to Panchakarma
days.description: Attend a detailed session on Panchakarma therapies and their benefits. Begin with Abhyanga (oil massage) to prepare the body for deeper detoxification. Relax with a nature walk in the surrounding hills.

days.title: Snehana & Swedana Therapy
days.description: Experience Snehana (oleation therapy) followed by Swedana (herbal steam bath) to loosen toxins. Enjoy a light Ayurvedic diet and participate in a group yoga session to enhance circulation.

days.title: Virechana (Purgation Therapy)
days.description: Undergo Virechana, a controlled purgation process to cleanse the gastrointestinal tract. Spend the afternoon in restorative yoga and a guided breathing workshop to support the detox process.

days.title: Basti (Enema Therapy) Session
days.description: Begin Basti therapy, a specialized Ayurvedic enema treatment for balancing Vata dosha. Relax with a gentle meditation session and enjoy a nourishing herbal soup for dinner.

days.title: Nasya (Nasal Therapy) Day
days.description: Receive Nasya treatment to clear sinus congestion and improve mental clarity. Participate in a mindfulness workshop and enjoy a peaceful evening by the retreat’s waterfall.

days.title: Rest & Rejuvenation
days.description: A lighter therapy day focused on rest and rejuvenation. Enjoy a full-body massage with herbal oils and spend time journaling or reading in the serene garden setting.

days.title: Yoga & Meditation Retreat
days.description: Engage in a full-day yoga and meditation program led by experienced instructors. Practice asanas to improve flexibility and participate in a sunset meditation overlooking the valley.

days.title: Ayurvedic Diet Workshop
days.description: Learn about Ayurvedic nutrition and how to incorporate healing foods into daily meals. Prepare a simple Ayurvedic dish under expert guidance and enjoy a communal lunch.

days.title: Nature Therapy & Forest Bathing
days.description: Participate in a guided forest therapy session in the lush surroundings of Lonavala. Practice grounding exercises and mindful walking to reconnect with nature.

days.title: Final Panchakarma Session
days.description: Complete the final phase of Panchakarma with a personalized therapy session. Reflect on your journey with a one-on-one consultation with the Ayurvedic doctor.

days.title: Silent Reflection Day
days.description: A day dedicated to silent reflection and introspection. Enjoy gentle yoga, meditation, and journaling in a peaceful environment to integrate your healing experience.

days.title: Cultural Exploration in Lonavala
days.description: Visit the scenic Lohagad Fort for a light hike and panoramic views. Explore local markets for Ayurvedic herbs and souvenirs before returning for a farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Lonavala
days.description: After a final Ayurvedic breakfast, check out and transfer to Lonavala railway station or Pune airport for your onward journey, carrying the benefits of your rejuvenating retreat.

FIT-INBOUND-7.overview: Experience the diverse flavors and landscapes of Kerala and Tamil Nadu with this 11-day journey through backwaters, spice plantations, wildlife sanctuaries, and colonial heritage. Stay at premium CGH Earth hotels offering authentic local hospitality and cuisine.

days.title: Arrival in Cochin – Welcome to Kerala
days.description: Arrive at Cochin International Airport and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening relaxing and enjoying a traditional Kerala welcome drink and light dinner.

days.title: Cochin – Forts, spices and Kathakali
days.description: Explore Fort Kochi’s colonial landmarks like the Chinese Fishing Nets and Mattancherry Palace. Attend a Kathakali performance in the evening and savor a seafood dinner by the waterfront.

days.title: Cochin to Kumarakom – Backwaters cruise
days.description: Drive to Kumarakom and enjoy a serene houseboat cruise through Vembanad Lake’s tranquil backwaters. Visit Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary to spot migratory birds in the late afternoon.

days.title: Kumarakom – Village life and fishing
days.description: Participate in a traditional fishing net demonstration and visit local coconut farms. Relax with a Kerala-style Ayurvedic massage at the resort before an early dinner.

days.title: Kumarakom to Thekkady – Spice plantation tour
days.description: Travel to Thekkady and tour a lush spice plantation, learning about cardamom, pepper, and vanilla cultivation. Enjoy a guided jungle walk in Periyar National Park in the late afternoon.

days.title: Thekkady – Wildlife and bamboo rafting
days.description: Take a jeep safari into Periyar Tiger Reserve to spot elephants and other wildlife. Later, enjoy a bamboo rafting adventure on the Periyar River followed by a campfire dinner.

days.title: Thekkady to Chettinad – Heritage trail begins
days.description: Drive to Chettinad and visit the ornate Chettinad mansions showcasing 19th-century Tamil Nadu architecture. Enjoy a traditional Chettinad vegetarian lunch at a heritage home.

days.title: Chettinad – Temples and silk weaving
days.description: Explore the grand Athangudi Temple and learn about Chettinad’s famous silk and cotton weaving at a local workshop. Sample authentic Chettinad cuisine for dinner.

days.title: Chettinad to Pondicherry – French Quarter walk
days.description: Travel to Pondicherry and stroll through the charming French Quarter with its colonial villas and bougainvillea-lined streets. Visit the Aurobindo Ashram and enjoy a sunset at the Promenade.

days.title: Pondicherry – Auroville and beaches
days.description: Spend the morning at Auroville, exploring the Matrimandir and visiting craft workshops. Relax on Serenity Beach in the afternoon before a farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Pondicherry
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Pondicherry Airport for your onward journey, carrying memories of Kerala’s culture and cuisine.

FIT-INBOUND-8.overview: An 8-day immersive tour of Kerala, exploring its lush landscapes, serene backwaters, and wildlife, culminating in a luxurious stay at CGH Earth Hotels.

days.title: Arrival in Cochin
days.description: Arrive at Cochin International Airport, meet your guide, and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening exploring Fort Kochi, visiting the Chinese Fishing Nets, and enjoying a traditional Kathakali dance performance.

days.title: Cochin to Thekkady
days.description: Morning drive to Thekkady (4-5 hours). Visit the spice plantations en route. Afternoon at leisure to relax or explore the local markets. Evening visit to a local spice market.

days.title: Thekkady Wildlife Safari
days.description: Full-day wildlife safari in Periyar National Park, including a boat cruise on Periyar Lake to spot elephants, tigers, and other wildlife. Evening cultural program featuring tribal dances.

days.title: Thekkady to Kumarakom
days.description: Morning drive to Kumarakom (3-4 hours). Check-in at CGH Earth Kumarakom. Afternoon houseboat cruise on Vembanad Lake, enjoying the serene backwaters and local cuisine.

days.title: Kumarakom Leisure & Activities
days.description: Day at leisure to enjoy the resort amenities, Ayurvedic treatments, or participate in bird watching and fishing activities. Evening sunset cruise on the backwaters.

days.title: Kumarakom to Marari
days.description: Morning drive to Marari Beach (1.5 hours). Check-in at CGH Earth Marari. Relax on the pristine beach or enjoy beachside activities like volleyball or Ayurvedic massages.

days.title: Marari Beach Day
days.description: Full day to unwind at the beach, explore the local fishing village, or opt for a village walk. Evening bonfire and seafood dinner by the shore.

days.title: Departure from Cochin
days.description: Morning transfer to Cochin Airport for departure. Optional stop at a local market for souvenirs before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-01.overview: A 9-day cultural and historical journey through Maharashtra, exploring the vibrant city of Mumbai, the heritage of Pune, the ancient caves of Aurangabad, and the spiritual vineyards of Nashik. This tour blends urban exploration, architectural marvels, and serene landscapes.

days.title: Arrival in Mumbai – Gateway of India
days.description: Arrive in Mumbai and check into your hotel. Visit the iconic Gateway of India and take a short ferry ride to the Elephanta Caves to explore ancient rock-cut temples. Enjoy a welcome dinner at a local seafood restaurant.

days.title: Mumbai – Colonial & Modern
days.description: Explore Mumbai’s colonial heritage with visits to the Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus and the Taj Mahal Palace Hotel. Visit the bustling Crawford Market and the serene Haji Ali Dargah. End the day with a dusk walk at Marine Drive.

days.title: Mumbai to Pune – Shivaji Legacy
days.description: Travel to Pune and visit the grand Shaniwar Wada fort, a symbol of Maratha power. Explore the Aga Khan Palace, a historic landmark associated with Mahatma Gandhi. Enjoy a traditional Maharashtrian lunch in the city.

days.title: Pune – Temples & Education
days.description: Visit the revered Dagadusheth Ganapati Temple and the historic Parvati Hill for panoramic views. Explore the Osho International Meditation Resort and the prestigious Fergusson College. Spend the evening exploring the lively FC Road.

days.title: Pune to Aurangabad – Ajanta Caves
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad and visit the UNESCO-listed Ajanta Caves, known for their ancient Buddhist murals and sculptures. Enjoy a traditional Aurangabad delicacy, like Naan Qalia, for dinner. Relax at your heritage hotel.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ellora & Grishneshwar
days.description: Explore the magnificent Ellora Caves, a UNESCO site featuring rock-cut temples from Hindu, Buddhist, and Jain traditions. Visit the nearby Grishneshwar Jyotirlinga Temple, one of the twelve sacred Shiva temples. Enjoy a cultural dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Aurangabad to Nashik – Wine & Temples
days.description: Travel to Nashik, known as the wine capital of India. Visit the ancient Kalaram Temple and the serene Panchavati ghats. Enjoy a wine tasting session at a local vineyard and a traditional Maharashtrian dinner.

days.title: Nashik – Spiritual & Scenic
days.description: Explore the Trimbakeshwar Jyotirlinga Temple, one of the holiest Shiva temples. Visit the scenic Anjaneri Fort and the peaceful Muktidham Temple. Spend the evening strolling through the lively Nashik market.

days.title: Nashik to Mumbai – Departure
days.description: Travel back to Mumbai for your departure. Depending on your flight time, you may visit the Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport or enjoy a quick city tour if time permits. Bid farewell to Maharashtra.

INBOUND-010.overview: Experience the cultural and historical richness of South India on this 11-day journey through Tamil Nadu and Kerala. The tour explores ancient temples, coastal heritage, colonial charm, and serene backwaters, offering a blend of spirituality, architecture, and natural beauty.

days.title: Arrival in Chennai
days.description: Arrive in Chennai, the gateway to South India. Check into your hotel and relax after your journey. In the evening, enjoy a cultural performance showcasing traditional Bharatanatyam dance.

days.title: Chennai city tour
days.description: Visit the iconic Marina Beach and the majestic Vivekananda Rock Memorial. Explore the Government Museum and Kapaleeshwarar Temple, a prime example of Dravidian architecture.

days.title: Mahabalipuram exploration
days.description: Discover the UNESCO-listed Shore Temple and the ancient rock-cut caves of Mahabalipuram. Witness the famous Five Rathas and enjoy a traditional coastal lunch by the Bay of Bengal.

days.title: Pondicherry heritage walk
days.description: Stroll through the charming streets of Pondicherry, visiting the Aurobindo Ashram and the iconic French Quarter. Enjoy a sunset at the Promenade and savor French-Indian cuisine.

days.title: Pondicherry to Thanjavur
days.description: Travel to Thanjavur, the cultural capital of the Chola dynasty. Visit the UNESCO-listed Brihadeeswarar Temple, a masterpiece of Dravidian architecture and engineering.

days.title: Thanjavur palace and art
days.description: Explore the Thanjavur Maratha Palace and the Royal Palace Museum. Visit the Saraswathi Mahal Library, housing ancient palm-leaf manuscripts and rare books.

days.title: Thanjavur to Madurai
days.description: Journey to Madurai, the temple city. Visit the Meenakshi Amman Temple, a stunning complex with colorful gopurams and sacred shrines.

days.title: Madurai temple rituals
days.description: Witness the early morning temple rituals at Meenakshi Amman Temple. Explore the Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace and the bustling streets of Madurai's bazaars.

days.title: Madurai to Kerala
days.description: Travel to Kerala, the 'God's Own Country.' Arrive in Alleppey and enjoy a serene houseboat cruise through the tranquil backwaters.

days.title: Kerala backwaters and village
days.description: Experience the beauty of Kerala's backwaters with a village walk and a traditional Kathakali dance performance. Relax and soak in the peaceful surroundings.

days.title: Departure from Kochi
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Kochi for your departure. If time permits, visit Fort Kochi and the Chinese fishing nets before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-011.overview: A 9-day wildlife-focused tour exploring India's premier national parks and cultural landmarks. Starting in Delhi, the itinerary includes safaris in Kanha and Bandhavgarh Tiger Reserves, a visit to the UNESCO-listed Khajuraho temples, and a final stop in Agra to see the Taj Mahal.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi, transfer to your hotel. Evening at leisure to rest or explore nearby markets. Overnight in Delhi.

days.title: Delhi to Kanha National Park
days.description: Morning flight to Jabalpur (via Delhi if needed), followed by a scenic drive to Kanha National Park. Afternoon safari in Kanha. Overnight in a jungle lodge within the park.

days.title: Kanha National Park Safari
days.description: Full-day safari in Kanha National Park, known for its Bengal tigers and lush sal forests. Evening at leisure. Overnight in the same lodge.

days.title: Kanha to Bandhavgarh National Park
days.description: Morning drive to Bandhavgarh National Park. Afternoon safari in the park, famous for its high tiger density. Overnight in a jungle lodge within Bandhavgarh.

days.title: Bandhavgarh National Park Safari
days.description: Full-day safari in Bandhavgarh, exploring different zones for wildlife sightings. Evening at leisure. Overnight in the same lodge.

days.title: Bandhavgarh to Khajuraho
days.description: Morning drive to Khajuraho. Afternoon visit to the UNESCO-listed Khajuraho Group of Monuments, known for their intricate carvings. Overnight in Khajuraho.

days.title: Khajuraho to Agra
days.description: Morning drive to Agra. Afternoon visit to the Taj Mahal and Agra Fort. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Agra.

days.title: Agra Exploration
days.description: Morning visit to Fatehpur Sikri, a historic city near Agra. Afternoon at leisure to explore local markets or visit the Mehtab Bagh for a sunset view of the Taj Mahal. Overnight in Agra.

days.title: Departure from Agra
days.description: Morning transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-012.overview: A 15-day immersive wildlife and cultural retreat across India, blending heritage exploration with thrilling safaris in renowned national parks. Experience the golden triangle, medieval temples, and tiger reserves while savoring local cuisine and traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi, transfer to a heritage hotel in Old Delhi. Evening heritage walk through Chandni Chowk, followed by a welcome dinner at a local restaurant.

days.title: Delhi Sightseeing
days.description: Explore Old and New Delhi: Jama Masjid, Red Fort, Humayun’s Tomb, Qutub Minar, and India Gate. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Delhi to Jaipur (Drive)
days.description: Morning drive to Jaipur (5.5 hrs). Visit Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Evening at leisure in the Pink City.

days.title: Jaipur Exploration
days.description: Visit Jantar Mantar, Albert Hall Museum, and local markets. Optional: Hot air balloon ride at sunrise. Evening cultural show.

days.title: Jaipur to Ranthambore (Drive)
days.description: Morning drive to Ranthambore (3.5 hrs). Afternoon safari in Ranthambore National Park (tiger spotting). Evening at the resort.

days.title: Ranthambore Safari
days.description: Full-day safari in Ranthambore (two sessions). Visit Ranthambore Fort. Evening storytelling session by local guides.

days.title: Ranthambore to Agra (Drive)
days.description: Morning drive to Agra (4.5 hrs). Visit Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh (sunset over Taj Mahal). Dinner with Taj view.

days.title: Agra Sightseeing
days.description: Sunrise visit to Taj Mahal, followed by Itmad-ud-Daulah and Akbar’s Tomb. Evening at leisure or optional Yamuna river cruise.

days.title: Agra to Khajuraho (Flight)
days.description: Morning flight to Khajuraho (via Delhi). Visit Western Group of Temples (UNESCO). Evening cultural dance performance.

days.title: Khajuraho to Bandhavgarh (Drive)
days.description: Morning drive to Bandhavgarh (6 hrs). Afternoon safari in Tala Zone. Evening at the jungle lodge.

days.title: Bandhavgarh Safari
days.description: Full-day safari in Bandhavgarh National Park (two sessions). Visit Bandhavgarh Fort. Night safari (optional).

days.title: Bandhavgarh to Kanha (Drive)
days.description: Morning drive to Kanha (5 hrs). Afternoon safari in Kanha National Park (Mukki Zone). Evening at the resort.

days.title: Kanha Safari
days.description: Full-day safari in Kanha (two sessions). Visit Bamni Dadar (sunset point). Cultural evening with Gond tribal dance.

days.title: Kanha to Mumbai (Flight)
days.description: Morning flight to Mumbai via Delhi. Afternoon free to explore Colaba, Marine Drive, or local markets. Evening farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Transfer to airport for departure.

INBOUND-013.overview: A 6-day panoramic tour of Leh Ladakh covering the vibrant capital Leh, the scenic Nubra Valley, and the breathtaking Pangong Lake. Experience high-altitude desert landscapes, ancient monasteries, and thrilling mountain passes.

days.title: Arrival in Leh - Acclimatization & Local Exploration
days.description: Arrive in Leh, the capital of Ladakh. Spend the day acclimatizing to the high altitude. Explore the local markets, visit the Leh Palace, and stroll through the colorful streets of the old town. Optional visit to the Shanti Stupa for panoramic views of Leh.

days.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass
days.description: Drive to Nubra Valley, one of the most stunning regions in Ladakh. Cross the world's highest motorable pass, Khardung La (18,380 ft), en route. Visit Diskit Monastery and enjoy the unique sand dunes of Hunder. Explore the twin villages of Hunder and Turtuk.

days.title: Nubra Valley - Camel Safari & Local Culture
days.description: Morning camel safari on the sand dunes of Hunder. Visit the ancient Diskit and Hunder monasteries. Explore the local villages and interact with the friendly locals. Optional visit to the Turtuk village, known for its apricot orchards and Balti culture.

days.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong Lake via Shyok River
days.description: Drive to Pangong Lake, one of the most iconic and beautiful lakes in the world. Cross the picturesque Shyok River valley and stop at Tangtse village. Arrive at Pangong Lake and enjoy the stunning views of the turquoise waters surrounded by mountains.

days.title: Pangong Lake - Sunrise & Exploration
days.description: Early morning visit to Pangong Lake for a breathtaking sunrise. Explore the lake's shores, visit the small Buddhist temple, and enjoy the serene surroundings. Optional activities include a short trek or photography session. Drive back towards Leh, stopping at Thiksey Monastery.

days.title: Departure from Leh
days.description: Morning at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to Leh airport for departure. Bid farewell to the mesmerizing landscapes of Ladakh.

INBOUND-014.overview: A 10-day immersive journey through the breathtaking landscapes of Leh & Ladakh, covering high-altitude deserts, serene lakes, ancient monasteries, and the majestic Himalayas. This itinerary balances adventure, culture, and relaxation with visits to Nubra Valley, Pangong Tso, Tso Moriri, and Lamayuru.

days.title: Arrival in Leh
days.description: Arrive at Leh Kushok Bakula Rimpochee Airport. Acclimatize to the high altitude (3,500m) with rest. Explore Leh Market, Leh Palace, and Shanti Stupa. Overnight in Leh.

days.title: Leh Sightseeing & Acclimatization
days.description: Visit Hemis Monastery, Thiksey Monastery, and Shey Palace. Explore Magnetic Hill and Sangam (confluence of Indus and Zanskar Rivers). Evening free for local exploration. Overnight in Leh.

days.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La
days.description: Drive to Nubra Valley (approx. 6-7 hours) via Khardung La Pass (18,380 ft), one of the world's highest motorable roads. Visit Diskit Monastery and Hunder Sand Dunes. Camel safari optional. Overnight in Diskit/Hunder.

days.title: Nubra Valley Exploration
days.description: Morning visit to Samstanling Monastery. Explore local villages and enjoy the stark beauty of the valley. Optional activities like ATV rides or village walks. Overnight in Diskit/Hunder.

days.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong Tso
days.description: Drive to Pangong Tso (approx. 5-6 hours) via Shyok River and Chang La Pass (17,590 ft). Enjoy the surreal beauty of Pangong Lake, a high-altitude saltwater lake. Overnight in Spangmik or Tangste.

days.title: Pangong Tso Exploration
days.description: Morning and evening walks along Pangong Lake. Visit the famous Bollywood shooting spot. Optional boating (subject to weather). Drive back towards Leh (approx. 5-6 hours). Overnight in Leh.

days.title: Leh to Tso Moriri via Chumathang
days.description: Drive to Tso Moriri (approx. 6-7 hours) via Upshi and Chumathang Hot Springs. Enjoy the pristine beauty of Tso Moriri Lake, a high-altitude wetland reserve. Overnight in Korzok or nearby.

days.title: Tso Moriri Exploration
days.description: Morning visit to Korzok Monastery. Explore the lake and surrounding landscapes. Optional activities like yak safari or nature walks. Overnight in Korzok.

days.title: Tso Moriri to Lamayuru via Leh
days.description: Drive back to Leh (approx. 3-4 hours) and continue to Lamayuru (approx. 2-3 hours). Visit Lamayuru Monastery, one of the oldest in Ladakh. Explore the lunar-like landscapes of the region. Overnight in Lamayuru.

days.title: Departure from Leh
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to Leh Airport for departure.

INBOUND-015.overview: A 10-day immersive journey through Northeast India, starting in Guwahati and exploring the wildlife of Kaziranga, the hill stations of Shillong, and the breathtaking landscapes of Tawang and Dirang.

days.title: Arrival in Guwahati
days.description: Arrive at Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport in Guwahati. Check into your hotel and relax. In the evening, explore the city's vibrant markets and enjoy a traditional Assamese dinner.

days.title: Guwahati to Kaziranga National Park
days.description: Drive to Kaziranga National Park (approx. 4-5 hours). En route, visit the Kaziranga Orchid Park. Arrive at Kaziranga, check into the resort, and enjoy a jeep safari in the park to spot one-horned rhinos, elephants, and other wildlife.

days.title: Kaziranga Exploration
days.description: Early morning elephant safari followed by a jeep safari to explore the diverse flora and fauna of Kaziranga. Visit the nearby tea gardens and interact with local tea workers. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Kaziranga to Shillong
days.description: Drive to Shillong (approx. 6-7 hours) via Umroi. En route, stop at the Elephant Falls and the Ward's Lake. Check into your hotel in Shillong and explore the local markets.

days.title: Shillong City Tour
days.description: Visit the Don Bosco Museum, Shillong Peak, and the Cathedral of Mary Help of Christians. Explore the local cafes and try Khasi cuisine. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Shillong to Tawang
days.description: Fly from Shillong to Tezpur (approx. 1 hour) and drive to Tawang (approx. 8-9 hours). En route, visit the Sela Pass and the Jaswant Garh War Memorial. Check into your hotel in Tawang.

days.title: Tawang Exploration
days.description: Visit the Tawang Monastery, the largest in India, and the nearby Tawang War Memorial. Explore the local markets and enjoy the scenic beauty of Tawang. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Tawang to Dirang
days.description: Drive to Dirang (approx. 4-5 hours). En route, visit the Nuranang Falls and the Dirang Dzong. Check into your hotel in Dirang and relax.

days.title: Dirang Exploration
days.description: Visit the Dirang Monastery and the nearby hot springs. Explore the local villages and interact with the Monpa community. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Departure from Guwahati
days.description: Drive back to Guwahati (approx. 6-7 hours). Check into your hotel and relax. In the evening, transfer to the airport for your departure flight.

INBOUND-016.overview: A 12-day immersive tour of North East India, exploring the scenic landscapes, cultural heritage, and wildlife of Sikkim, West Bengal, Meghalaya, and Assam. The journey includes visits to serene monasteries, vibrant markets, lush tea gardens, and the world-famous Kaziranga National Park.

days.title: Arrival in Gangtok, Sikkim
days.description: Arrive at Bagdogra Airport or New Jalpaiguri Railway Station (NJP) and transfer to Gangtok (approx. 4-5 hours drive). Check-in at a hotel, relax, and explore the local market in the evening. Overnight in Gangtok.

days.title: Gangtok Sightseeing
days.description: Visit the Tsuk-La-Khang Monastery, Enchey Monastery, and the Namgyal Institute of Tibetology. Explore the Rumtek Monastery and enjoy the scenic views of the Himalayas. In the evening, visit the local market for souvenirs. Overnight in Gangtok.

days.title: Gangtok to Lachen
days.description: Drive to Lachen (approx. 5-6 hours), a picturesque village in North Sikkim. En route, visit the Seven Sisters Waterfalls and Phodong Monastery. Check-in at a homestay and enjoy the serene ambiance. Overnight in Lachen.

days.title: Lachen to Lachung
days.description: Morning drive to Lachung (approx. 2-3 hours). Visit the Yumthang Valley, known as the 'Valley of Flowers,' and the Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary. Explore the Lachung Monastery and local markets. Overnight in Lachung.

days.title: Lachung to Pelling
days.description: Drive to Pelling (approx. 4-5 hours), a charming hill station in West Sikkim. Visit the Pemayangtse Monastery, the oldest monastery in Sikkim, and the Rabdentse Ruins. Enjoy the panoramic views of the Kanchenjunga range. Overnight in Pelling.

days.title: Pelling Sightseeing
days.description: Explore the Sangay Waterfalls, the Khecheopalri Lake, and the nearby villages. Visit the Tashiding Monastery, one of the most sacred monasteries in Sikkim. In the evening, enjoy the local cuisine and cultural performances. Overnight in Pelling.

days.title: Pelling to Shillong
days.description: Morning drive to Shillong (approx. 8-9 hours), the capital of Meghalaya. En route, stop at the Teesta River and enjoy the scenic views. Check-in at a hotel and explore the local markets. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong Sightseeing
days.description: Visit the Elephant Falls, the Shillong Peak, and the Don Bosco Museum. Explore the local markets for handicrafts and souvenirs. In the evening, enjoy the vibrant nightlife of Shillong. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong to Kaziranga
days.description: Drive to Kaziranga National Park (approx. 5-6 hours), a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Check-in at a wildlife resort and relax. In the evening, enjoy a short nature walk around the resort. Overnight in Kaziranga.

days.title: Kaziranga Safari
days.description: Morning and evening jeep safaris in Kaziranga National Park to spot the one-horned rhinoceros, elephants, and other wildlife. Visit the nearby tea gardens and local villages. Overnight in Kaziranga.

days.title: Kaziranga to Guwahati
days.description: Morning drive to Guwahati (approx. 4-5 hours). Visit the Kamakhya Temple and the Umananda Island. Explore the local markets and enjoy the local cuisine. Overnight in Guwahati.

days.title: Departure from Guwahati
days.description: Morning transfer to Guwahati Airport or Railway Station for departure.

INBOUND-02.overview: Experience the grandeur of India's royal heritage on this 16-day journey through historic palaces, forts, and cultural landmarks. From the bustling streets of Delhi to the spiritual ghats of Varanasi and the serene temples of Khajuraho, this tour offers a blend of opulence, history, and spirituality.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in India's capital and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, exploring nearby markets or relaxing after your journey.

days.title: Old Delhi heritage walk
days.description: Explore the historic lanes of Old Delhi, visiting the Jama Masjid and Chandni Chowk. Enjoy a traditional Mughlai lunch before visiting the Red Fort.

days.title: New Delhi royal sights
days.description: Visit the grand Rashtrapati Bhavan and Humayun's Tomb. Afternoon at leisure to explore Connaught Place or visit the Qutub Minar.

days.title: Fly to Udaipur – City of Lakes
days.description: Fly to Udaipur and check into your heritage hotel. Visit the City Palace and enjoy a sunset boat ride on Lake Pichola.

days.title: Udaipur royal palaces tour
days.description: Explore the Jagdish Temple and Saheliyon-ki-Bari garden. Evening at leisure to explore local markets or enjoy a cultural performance.

days.title: Travel to Jaipur by road
days.description: Drive to Jaipur, stopping at Abhaneri stepwell en route. Arrive in Jaipur and visit the Amber Fort with an elephant ride.

days.title: Jaipur royal palaces & markets
days.description: Visit the Hawa Mahal and City Palace. Explore Johari Bazaar for traditional Rajasthani souvenirs and crafts.

days.title: Jaipur to Agra – Taj Mahal
days.description: Drive to Agra, visiting Fatehpur Sikri en route. Arrive in Agra and visit the Taj Mahal at sunset.

days.title: Agra Fort & Mughal heritage
days.description: Explore Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh for a moonlit view of the Taj. Evening at leisure to enjoy local Mughlai cuisine.

days.title: Orchha – Hidden royal gem
days.description: Drive to Orchha, visiting Jhansi Fort en route. Explore the Orchha Fort complex and Ram Raja Temple.

days.title: Khajuraho temples & dance
days.description: Fly to Khajuraho and visit the Western Group of Temples. Evening cultural dance performance at the temple complex.

days.title: Varanasi – Spiritual Ganga
days.description: Fly to Varanasi and visit the Dashashwamedh Ghat for the Ganga Aarti ceremony. Explore the narrow lanes of the old city.

days.title: Varanasi boat ride & silk
days.description: Sunrise boat ride on the Ganges, visiting the ghats and temples. Visit a silk weaving workshop in the afternoon.

days.title: Fly to Kathmandu
days.description: Fly to Kathmandu and check into your hotel. Visit Swayambhunath Stupa and explore Thamel market in the evening.

days.title: Kathmandu heritage tour
days.description: Visit the Durbar Square and Pashupatinath Temple. Enjoy a farewell dinner with Nepali cultural performances.

days.title: Departure from Kathmandu
days.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey. End of the tour with cherished memories of Indian and Nepali royalty.

INBOUND-03.overview: This 15-day Heritage Trail tour explores India's rich cultural and architectural legacy, from Mughal and Rajput monuments in Delhi to ancient temples in Khajuraho and medieval ruins in Mandu. The journey blends history, art, and scenic landscapes across key heritage sites.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Welcome to India
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to your hotel. Enjoy a welcome dinner featuring North Indian cuisine, followed by a brief orientation to the tour.

days.title: Old Delhi Exploration
days.description: Visit the Jama Masjid, Chandni Chowk, and the Red Fort. Explore the bustling spice and textile markets before a heritage walk through the walled city.

days.title: New Delhi Landmarks
days.description: Tour the India Gate, Humayun’s Tomb, and Qutub Minar. Experience the contrast between colonial and Mughal architecture in Lutyens' Delhi.

days.title: Travel to Gwalior – Fort & Palaces
days.description: Travel to Gwalior by train or road. Visit the imposing Gwalior Fort and the intricately carved Sas Bahu Temples.

days.title: Gwalior’s Cultural Gems
days.description: Explore the Jai Vilas Palace Museum and the Teli Ka Mandir. Attend a local Sufi music performance in the evening.

days.title: Travel to Khajuraho – Temples of Love
days.description: Travel to Khajuraho by road. Visit the Western Group of Temples, famous for their intricate erotic sculptures.

days.title: Khajuraho Dance Festival
days.description: Explore the Eastern and Southern Group of Temples. In the evening, enjoy a classical dance performance at the Khajuraho Dance Festival (seasonal).

days.title: Travel to Orchha – Riverside Heritage
days.description: Travel to Orchha by road. Visit the Orchha Fort Complex, including Jahangir Mahal and Ram Raja Temple.

days.title: Orchha’s Temples & Palaces
days.description: Explore the Chaturbhuj Temple and the cenotaphs along the Betwa River. Enjoy a sunset boat ride on the river.

days.title: Travel to Bhopal – Lakes & Mosques
days.description: Travel to Bhopal by road. Visit the Upper Lake and the historic Taj-ul-Masajid, one of India’s largest mosques.

days.title: Bhopal’s Museums & Markets
days.description: Tour the State Museum and the Tribal Museum. Explore the local markets for handicrafts and textiles.

days.title: Travel to Mandu – Medieval Ruins
days.description: Travel to Mandu by road. Visit the Jahaz Mahal and Hindola Mahal, showcasing Afghan architecture.

days.title: Mandu’s Palaces & Gardens
days.description: Explore the Rani Rupmati Pavilion and the Baz Bahadur Palace. Enjoy panoramic views from the Darwaza-e-Alamgir.

days.title: Travel to Mumbai – City of Dreams
days.description: Travel to Mumbai by flight. Visit the Gateway of India and Colaba Causeway for a taste of urban India.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Spend the morning at leisure before transferring to the airport for your departure flight.

INBOUND-05.overview: A 13-day journey through Rajasthan's most iconic forts, palaces, and desert landscapes, beginning in Delhi and ending in Devigarh. Experience royal heritage, golden sands, and vibrant culture.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi, transfer to hotel. Explore nearby attractions like India Gate or Qutub Minar. Overnight stay in Delhi.

days.title: Delhi to Neemrana
days.description: Drive to Neemrana (approx. 2.5 hours). Visit Neemrana Fort Palace, a 15th-century hilltop fort. Explore the fort's architecture and enjoy panoramic views. Overnight at Neemrana Fort Palace.

days.title: Neemrana to Jaipur
days.description: Drive to Jaipur (approx. 3 hours). Visit Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Explore local markets for handicrafts. Overnight in Jaipur.

days.title: Jaipur Exploration
days.description: Full day in Jaipur: Visit Jantar Mantar, Albert Hall Museum, and Nahargarh Fort. Optional: Hot air balloon ride or shopping at Johari Bazaar. Overnight in Jaipur.

days.title: Jaipur to Gajner
days.description: Drive to Gajner (approx. 5 hours). Visit Gajner Palace and explore the lakeside fort. Enjoy a cultural evening with folk dances. Overnight at Gajner Palace.

days.title: Gajner to Jaisalmer
days.description: Drive to Jaisalmer (approx. 4.5 hours). Visit Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon Ki Haveli, and the desert culture center. Enjoy a camel safari in the Thar Desert. Overnight in Jaisalmer.

days.title: Jaisalmer Exploration
days.description: Full day in Jaisalmer: Visit Bada Bagh, Sam Sand Dunes for sunset, and local markets. Optional: Desert camping experience. Overnight in Jaisalmer.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Luni
days.description: Drive to Luni (approx. 30 minutes). Visit Luni Fort and enjoy a heritage stay at Luni Lodge. Explore the local village and interact with artisans. Overnight at Luni Lodge.

days.title: Luni to Rohet
days.description: Drive to Rohet (approx. 2 hours). Visit Rohet Fort and explore the rural charm of Rajasthan. Enjoy a village safari and cultural performances. Overnight at Rohetgarh.

days.title: Rohet Exploration
days.description: Full day in Rohet: Visit local temples, interact with villagers, and enjoy nature walks. Optional: Birdwatching at nearby lakes. Overnight at Rohetgarh.

days.title: Rohet to Devigarh
days.description: Drive to Devigarh (approx. 5 hours). Visit Devigarh Fort and explore the serene surroundings. Enjoy a traditional Rajasthani dinner. Overnight at Devigarh Fort.

days.title: Devigarh Exploration
days.description: Full day in Devigarh: Visit local temples, enjoy nature walks, and relax at the fort. Optional: Cooking class or pottery workshop. Overnight at Devigarh Fort.

days.title: Departure from Devigarh
days.description: Morning at leisure. Transfer to the nearest airport/railway station for departure.

INBOUND-06.overview: Experience the rich cultural heritage, royal history, and coastal charm of Gujarat on this 14-day tour. From vibrant Ahmedabad to the serene beaches of Diu and the ancient wonders of Bhuj, this itinerary offers a blend of history, wildlife, and local traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Ahmedabad
days.description: Arrive in Ahmedabad, the commercial capital of Gujarat. Check into your hotel and relax after your journey. Spend the evening exploring the local markets or visiting the famous Sidi Saiyyed Mosque.

days.title: Ahmedabad – Heritage Walk
days.description: Join the Heritage Walk, a guided tour through the old city’s pols (traditional neighborhoods). Visit the Jama Masjid, Bhadra Fort, and Gandhi Ashram to learn about Ahmedabad’s history and Gandhi’s legacy.

days.title: Ahmedabad – Sabarmati Ashram
days.description: Visit the Sabarmati Ashram, Gandhi’s former residence, and explore the museum showcasing his life and teachings. Later, visit the Calico Museum of Textiles to admire rare fabric collections.

days.title: Ahmedabad to Bhavnagar
days.description: Travel to Bhavnagar, a historic city known for its shipbuilding industry. Visit the Nilambagh Palace and the Barton Library. Explore the vibrant Gandhi Smarak Bhavan and local markets.

days.title: Bhavnagar – Blackbuck National Park
days.description: Head to the Blackbuck National Park to spot the endangered blackbuck antelope and other wildlife. Enjoy a jeep safari through the grasslands and learn about the region’s biodiversity.

days.title: Bhavnagar to Diu
days.description: Drive to Diu, a charming coastal union territory with Portuguese influences. Visit Diu Fort, Nagoa Beach, and the St. Paul’s Church. Enjoy fresh seafood at the local restaurants.

days.title: Diu – Island Exploration
days.description: Explore Diu’s beaches, including Ghogla Beach and Sunset Point. Visit the Diu Museum and the Nagoa Aquarium. Relax by the sea and enjoy water sports like parasailing.

days.title: Diu to Sasangir
days.description: Travel to Sasangir, home to the Gir National Park, the last abode of the Asiatic lion. Enjoy a jungle safari to spot lions, leopards, and other wildlife in their natural habitat.

days.title: Sasangir – Gir Forest Safari
days.description: Embark on a full-day safari in Gir National Park to see Asiatic lions, deer, and birds. Visit the Devalia Safari Park for a controlled wildlife experience. Learn about conservation efforts in the region.

days.title: Sasangir to Gondal
days.description: Drive to Gondal, a former princely state known for its royal heritage. Visit the Naulakha Palace, the Orchard Palace, and the Swaminarayan Temple. Explore the local markets for handicrafts.

days.title: Gondal – Royal Heritage Tour
days.description: Tour the royal palaces and museums in Gondal, including the Royal Chowk and the Huzoor Palace. Visit the famous Gondal toy museum and enjoy a traditional Gujarati meal at a local restaurant.

days.title: Gondal to Bhuj
days.description: Travel to Bhuj, a historic city in Kutch. Visit the Aina Mahal, Prag Mahal, and the Swaminarayan Temple. Explore the local handicrafts and the vibrant Bhujodi village known for its weaving.

days.title: Bhuj – Rann of Kutch
days.description: Visit the Great Rann of Kutch, a vast salt marsh known for its surreal landscape. Explore the seasonal white desert and enjoy cultural performances at the Rann Utsav if visiting during the festival season.

days.title: Departure from Ahmedabad
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Ahmedabad for your departure. Spend any remaining time shopping for souvenirs or visiting local attractions before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-07.overview: Embark on a royal journey through India's golden triangle and beyond, exploring the regal heritage of Rajasthan. This 14-day tour showcases palaces, forts, and desert landscapes, blending history, culture, and adventure.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Welcome to India
days.description: Arrive in the capital city and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, soaking in the vibrant atmosphere of Delhi.

days.title: Delhi – Historic Landmarks Tour
days.description: Visit the Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and Chandni Chowk in Old Delhi. In the afternoon, explore Humayun’s Tomb and Qutub Minar in New Delhi.

days.title: Delhi to Mandawa – Shekhawati Havelis
days.description: Drive to Mandawa, a charming town in Shekhawati. Explore the ornate havelis like Mandawa Haveli and Murmuria Haveli, showcasing frescoes and Rajasthani art.

days.title: Mandawa to Bikaner – Camel Country
days.description: Travel to Bikaner, known for its rich history and camel culture. Visit Junagarh Fort and explore the old city’s bustling markets.

days.title: Bikaner – Jain Temples & Sweets
days.description: Discover the intricate architecture of Bhandasar Jain Temple and Laxmi Niwas Palace. Sample Bikaner’s famous sweets like bhujia and rasgullas.

days.title: Bikaner to Jaisalmer – Golden Desert
days.description: Drive to Jaisalmer, the golden city of the Thar Desert. Visit the Jaisalmer Fort and enjoy a sunset camel ride in the dunes.

days.title: Jaisalmer – Desert Safari Adventure
days.description: Explore the Sam Sand Dunes and enjoy a cultural program with folk dances. Spend the night in a desert camp under the stars.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Jodhpur – Blue City Views
days.description: Travel to Jodhpur, the Blue City. Visit Mehrangarh Fort and explore the vibrant streets of the old city.

days.title: Jodhpur – Heritage & Culture
days.description: Discover Jaswant Thada and Umaid Bhawan Palace. Stroll through the bustling Sardar Market for local crafts and textiles.

days.title: Jodhpur to Udaipur – Lakes & Palaces
days.description: Drive to Udaipur, the City of Lakes. Visit City Palace and enjoy a boat ride on Lake Pichola.

days.title: Udaipur – Royal Heritage Walk
days.description: Explore Jagdish Temple, Bagore Ki Haveli, and Saheliyon-ki-Bari. Experience a traditional Rajasthani dinner with cultural performances.

days.title: Udaipur to Jaipur – Pink City Arrival
days.description: Travel to Jaipur, the Pink City. Visit Amber Fort and enjoy a shopping spree at Johari Bazaar.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Sightseeing Tour
days.description: Explore Hawa Mahal, City Palace, and Jantar Mantar. Enjoy a farewell dinner with Rajasthani folk music and dance.

days.title: Departure from Jaipur
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Jaipur Airport for your onward journey. Bid farewell to the royal lands of Rajasthan.

Inbound-09.overview: Experience the serene beauty of Kerala with this 11-day journey through lush tea plantations, serene backwaters, and pristine beaches. Starting in Cochin, you'll explore vibrant culture, wildlife sanctuaries, and tranquil houseboat stays before relaxing in the coastal charm of Kovalam.

days.title: Arrival in Cochin
days.description: Arrive in Cochin (Kochi), Kerala's bustling port city. Check into your hotel and explore the historic Fort Kochi area, including the iconic Chinese Fishing Nets, Jewish Synagogue, and Mattancherry Palace. Enjoy a traditional Kathakali dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Cochin to Munnar
days.description: Travel to Munnar (approx. 4-5 hours by road). En route, visit the scenic Cheeyappara and Valara waterfalls. Upon arrival, check into your plantation stay and enjoy the cool mountain air. Explore the nearby tea gardens and visit the Eravikulam National Park (if time permits).

days.title: Exploring Munnar
days.description: Spend the day exploring Munnar's attractions. Visit the Mattupetty Dam and Echo Point, take a boat ride at Kundala Lake, and hike to the Top Station for panoramic views. In the evening, relax at your resort and enjoy a bonfire.

days.title: Munnar to Thekkady
days.description: Drive to Thekkady (approx. 3-4 hours). Check into a jungle resort and visit the Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary in the afternoon. Enjoy a guided jungle safari to spot elephants, tigers, and other wildlife. In the evening, experience a traditional Kathakali performance.

days.title: Thekkady Exploration
days.description: Spend the day exploring Thekkady's natural beauty. Opt for a bamboo rafting tour on the Periyar Lake, visit the spice plantations, or take a jeep safari into the sanctuary. Alternatively, enjoy a relaxing Ayurvedic massage at your resort.

days.title: Thekkady to Kumarakom
days.description: Travel to Kumarakom (approx. 4-5 hours). Check into a lakeside resort and enjoy a serene evening by the Vembanad Lake. Visit the Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary and take a houseboat cruise to witness the sunset over the backwaters.

days.title: Kumarakom Relaxation
days.description: Spend the day at leisure in Kumarakom. Enjoy a traditional Kerala breakfast, take a canoe ride through the backwaters, or visit the nearby Pathiramanal Island. In the evening, indulge in a seafood dinner at a lakeside restaurant.

days.title: Kumarakom to Alleppey
days.description: Travel to Alleppey (approx. 1.5 hours). Check into a houseboat and embark on a 24-hour backwater cruise. Enjoy the scenic beauty, visit local villages, and savor freshly prepared Kerala meals on board. Witness the serene backwaters at sunset.

days.title: Alleppey Backwaters
days.description: Continue your houseboat cruise through the Alleppey backwaters. Explore the narrow canals, interact with locals, and enjoy the tranquility of the surroundings. In the evening, participate in a traditional Kerala cultural program on board.

days.title: Alleppey to Kovalam
days.description: Travel to Kovalam (approx. 3-4 hours). Check into a beachfront resort and relax by the Arabian Sea. Visit the iconic lighthouse and enjoy a sunset walk along the crescent-shaped beach. In the evening, indulge in fresh seafood at a beachside restaurant.

days.title: Departure from Kovalam
days.description: After breakfast, enjoy a leisurely morning at the beach or a quick Ayurvedic treatment. Depending on your flight/train schedule, transfer to Trivandrum International Airport (approx. 15 km) for your onward journey.

INBOUND-12.overview: A rejuvenating 12-day Ayurveda and Spa tour through Kerala's serene backwaters and coastal retreats, featuring authentic Ayurvedic treatments, yoga sessions, and luxurious spa experiences.

days.title: Arrival in Kochi
days.description: Arrive at Kochi International Airport. Transfer to a heritage hotel in Fort Kochi. Evening leisure walk along the Chinese Fishing Nets and local markets. Overnight stay in Kochi.

days.title: Ayurvedic Introduction & Kochi Sightseeing
days.description: Morning consultation with an Ayurvedic doctor for personalized treatment plan. Visit Kerala Kathakali Centre and St. Francis Church. Afternoon Ayurvedic oil massage session. Overnight in Kochi.

days.title: Travel to Kumarakom & Backwater Relaxation
days.description: Morning drive to Kumarakom (1.5 hours). Check-in at a lakeside resort. Afternoon Ayurvedic therapies including Abhyanga and Shirodhara. Sunset cruise on Vembanad Lake. Overnight in Kumarakom.

days.title: Ayurvedic Panchakarma Prep & Village Tour
days.description: Morning yoga session followed by Ayurvedic therapies. Visit Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary and local village. Evening Ayurvedic steam bath and herbal drink session. Overnight in Kumarakom.

days.title: Travel to Alleppey & Houseboat Embarkation
days.description: Morning drive to Alleppey (2 hours). Board a traditional houseboat for a 2-day Ayurvedic cruise. Afternoon Ayurvedic treatments onboard. Enjoy scenic backwaters and village life. Overnight on houseboat.

days.title: Houseboat Ayurveda & Alleppey Exploration
days.description: Morning yoga on deck followed by Ayurvedic therapies. Explore Alleppey town and coir industries. Evening sunset views and Ayurvedic herbal steam. Overnight on houseboat.

days.title: Disembark & Travel to Kovalam
days.description: Morning disembark houseboat. Drive to Kovalam (3.5 hours). Check-in at a beachfront resort. Afternoon Ayurvedic consultation and initial treatments. Sunset at Lighthouse Beach. Overnight in Kovalam.

days.title: Ayurvedic Rejuvenation & Beach Therapy
days.description: Full-day Ayurvedic therapies including Pizhichil and Njavarakizhi. Evening beach walk and meditation session. Overnight in Kovalam.

days.title: Ayurvedic Detox & Yoga Retreat
days.description: Morning yoga and Pranayama session. Full-day Ayurvedic detox treatments and herbal steam bath. Evening Ayurvedic cooking class. Overnight in Kovalam.

days.title: Beach Relaxation & Local Exploration
days.description: Morning beach yoga and Ayurvedic foot massage. Visit Kovalam’s Vizhinjam Marine Aquarium and local markets. Afternoon Ayurvedic facial and body scrub. Overnight in Kovalam.

days.title: Final Ayurvedic Session & Leisure Time
days.description: Morning final Ayurvedic treatment session. Free time for beach relaxation or souvenir shopping. Evening farewell dinner with traditional Kerala cuisine. Overnight in Kovalam.

days.title: Departure from Kovalam
days.description: Morning transfer to Trivandrum International Airport (1 hour) for departure.

INBOUND-13.overview: Embark on an 8-day cultural journey aboard the luxurious Palace on Wheels, exploring India's royal heritage, historic forts, and vibrant cities. This itinerary covers Jaipur, Chittorgarh, Udaipur, Jaisalmer, Jodhpur, Agra, and Delhi, blending heritage, architecture, and local traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
days.description: Arrive in Jaipur, the Pink City, and board the Palace on Wheels. Enjoy a welcome drink and light refreshments. Later, visit the Amber Fort with an elephant ride (optional) and explore the local markets for handicrafts and textiles. Evening cultural performance on board.

days.title: Jaipur to Chittorgarh
days.description: Morning sightseeing in Jaipur includes the City Palace, Jantar Mantar, and Hawa Mahal. Afternoon departure to Chittorgarh. Evening arrival and visit to the Chittorgarh Fort, one of the largest forts in India, known for its tales of bravery and sacrifice.

days.title: Chittorgarh to Udaipur
days.description: Morning visit to the Vijay Stambh and Kirti Stambh within Chittorgarh Fort. Afternoon travel to Udaipur, the City of Lakes. Evening boat ride on Lake Pichola and visit to the City Palace. Cultural performance and dinner on board.

days.title: Udaipur Sightseeing
days.description: Full day in Udaipur exploring the Jagdish Temple, Saheliyon-ki-Bari, and the Fateh Sagar Lake. Optional activities include a heritage walk or a visit to the Sajjangarh Palace. Evening at leisure on board.

days.title: Udaipur to Jaisalmer
days.description: Morning departure to Jaisalmer, the Golden City. Afternoon sightseeing includes the Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon Ki Haveli, and Salim Singh Ki Haveli. Evening camel ride in the Thar Desert and cultural program on board.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Jodhpur
days.description: Morning visit to the Sam Sand Dunes for a desert safari. Afternoon travel to Jodhpur, the Blue City. Evening sightseeing at the Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada. Dinner and cultural show on board.

days.title: Jodhpur to Agra
days.description: Morning visit to the Clock Tower and local markets in Jodhpur. Afternoon travel to Agra. Evening visit to the Agra Fort and a mesmerizing Taj Mahal at sunset. Return to the train for dinner and overnight journey.

days.title: Agra to Delhi & Departure
days.description: Morning visit to the Taj Mahal for a sunrise view. After breakfast, depart for Delhi. Arrive in Delhi and transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-15.overview: A 10-day immersive journey through the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, starting in Port Blair and exploring the pristine beaches, lush forests, and vibrant marine life of Havelock and Neil Islands.

days.title: Arrival in Port Blair
days.description: Arrive at Port Blair's Veer Savarkar International Airport. Check into your hotel and relax. Visit the nearby Cellular Jail for a historical insight into India's freedom struggle. Evening at leisure to explore the local markets.

days.title: Port Blair - City Tour
days.description: Morning visit to the Anthropological Museum to learn about the indigenous tribes of the islands. Afternoon at Corbyn's Cove Beach for relaxation. Evening explore the vibrant MG Road for shopping and dining.

days.title: Port Blair to Havelock Island
days.description: Morning ferry to Havelock Island (approx. 2 hours). Check into your resort. Afternoon visit Radhanagar Beach, one of Asia's best beaches. Sunset viewing at Elephant Beach. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Havelock Island - Adventure & Exploration
days.description: Full-day adventure activities including snorkeling at Elephant Beach, scuba diving (optional), and a nature walk to Kalapathar Beach. Evening enjoy local seafood at a beachside restaurant.

days.title: Havelock Island - Relaxation & Water Sports
days.description: Morning free for beach relaxation or optional activities like kayaking. Afternoon visit Vijaynagar Beach and explore the lush greenery of Havelock. Evening stroll along the beachfront.

days.title: Havelock to Neil Island
days.description: Morning ferry to Neil Island (approx. 1.5 hours). Check into your resort. Afternoon visit Sitapur Beach, known for its white sands and clear waters. Sunset at Bharatpur Beach. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Neil Island - Island Hopping & Nature
days.description: Full-day island exploration including a visit to Lakshmanpur Beach, Natural Bridge, and a boat ride to the nearby coral reefs. Enjoy fresh coconut water and local cuisine.

days.title: Neil Island - Cultural & Scenic Delights
days.description: Morning visit to the local village and market. Afternoon relax at Ramnagar Beach or opt for a glass-bottom boat ride. Evening enjoy a cultural performance by local artists.

days.title: Neil Island to Port Blair
days.description: Morning ferry back to Port Blair. Afternoon visit the Samudrika Marine Museum to learn about the marine life of the islands. Evening free for last-minute shopping or beach time.

days.title: Departure from Port Blair
days.description: Morning at leisure. Check out and transfer to the airport for departure. End of the tour.

INBOUND-17.overview: Experience the royal heritage, vibrant culture, and golden deserts of Rajasthan on this 8-day journey through Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer, and Udaipur. Explore grand palaces, historic forts, and the Thar Desert while indulging in local cuisine and traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
