days.description: Arrive in Jaipur, the Pink City. Check into your heritage hotel. Evening visit to the local market for shopping and dinner at a traditional Rajasthani restaurant.

days.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
days.description: Full-day tour of Jaipur including Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, and local markets. Evening cultural show with folk dance and music.

days.title: Travel to Jodhpur
days.description: Morning drive to Jodhpur (approx. 5-6 hours). Visit Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada. Evening walk around the Blue City and dinner at a rooftop restaurant.

days.title: Jodhpur Exploration
days.description: Explore Umaid Bhawan Palace, visit the Clock Tower and local markets. Optional: Short camel ride or jeep safari near the fort. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Travel to Jaisalmer
days.description: Morning drive to Jaisalmer (approx. 5 hours). Visit Jaisalmer Fort and local havelis. Evening sunset camel safari in the Thar Desert followed by dinner under the stars.

days.title: Jaisalmer Desert Adventure
days.description: Full-day desert experience including village tour, sand dunes visit, and cultural performances. Overnight stay in a desert camp.

days.title: Travel to Udaipur
days.description: Morning drive to Udaipur (approx. 5 hours). Visit City Palace, Jagdish Temple, and Saheliyon-ki-Bari. Evening boat ride on Lake Pichola and dinner at a lakeside restaurant.

days.title: Departure from Udaipur
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-18.overview: Experience the royal heritage and vibrant culture of Rajasthan with this 8-day tour covering Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer, and Udaipur. Explore majestic palaces, desert landscapes, and historic forts while indulging in local cuisine and traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
days.description: Arrive in Jaipur, the Pink City. Check into your heritage hotel. Evening visit to Jantar Mantar and Hawa Mahal. Enjoy a welcome dinner at a local restaurant.

days.title: Jaipur Exploration
days.description: Full day exploring Jaipur: Amber Fort, City Palace, and local markets for handicrafts. Evening at leisure or optional folk dance performance.

days.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur
days.description: Morning drive to Jodhpur (approx. 5-6 hours). Visit Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada. Evening stroll in the Blue City's colorful streets.

days.title: Jodhpur Sightseeing
days.description: Explore Umaid Bhawan Palace, Clock Tower, and local markets. Optional visit to Bishnoi Village for cultural immersion. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer
days.description: Morning drive to Jaisalmer (approx. 5 hours). Visit Jaisalmer Fort and local markets. Evening camel ride and cultural program in the Thar Desert.

days.title: Jaisalmer Desert Experience
days.description: Full day in the Thar Desert: visit Sam Sand Dunes, enjoy a traditional Rajasthani lunch, and participate in desert activities like camel safari and folk performances.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Udaipur
days.description: Morning drive to Udaipur (approx. 6-7 hours). Visit City Palace and Jagdish Temple. Evening boat ride on Lake Pichola.

days.title: Departure from Udaipur
days.description: Morning at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-19.overview: Experience the breathtaking beauty of Uttarakhand with this 8-day tour covering hill stations, holy cities, and serene lakes. From the colonial charm of Mussoorie to the spiritual aura of Haridwar and Rishikesh, this itinerary offers a perfect blend of adventure, culture, and relaxation.

days.title: Arrival in Mussoorie
days.description: Arrive in Mussoorie, the Queen of Hills, and check into your hotel. Enjoy the cool mountain air and relax while soaking in the panoramic views of the Himalayas. Spend the evening exploring the Mall Road, visiting local cafes, and enjoying the vibrant atmosphere.

days.title: Mussoorie sightseeing
days.description: Visit Kempty Falls, a picturesque waterfall surrounded by lush greenery. Explore Gun Hill, the second-highest point in Mussoorie, accessible by ropeway, offering stunning views of the Doon Valley. In the afternoon, visit the historic Christ Church and stroll through the charming town.

days.title: Drive to Haridwar
days.description: Travel to Haridwar, one of the seven holiest cities in Hinduism. Visit Har Ki Pauri, the sacred ghat on the banks of the Ganges, and witness the evening Ganga Aarti. Explore the bustling markets and enjoy local street food like aloo puri and jalebi.

days.title: Haridwar to Rishikesh
days.description: Drive to Rishikesh, the yoga capital of the world, and visit the iconic Lakshman Jhula and Ram Jhula bridges. Explore the Beatles Ashram, a historic site associated with the famous band. In the evening, attend the Ganga Aarti at Triveni Ghat.

days.title: Rishikesh adventure
days.description: Engage in thrilling adventure activities like white-water rafting on the Ganges or a guided trekking experience. Visit the ancient Neelkanth Mahadev Temple, perched atop a hill with stunning views. Relax in the evening by the riverfront or explore local cafes and shops.

days.title: Drive to Auli
days.description: Travel to Auli, a pristine hill station known for its apple orchards and panoramic Himalayan views. Visit the Auli Artificial Lake and enjoy a cable car ride to get a bird's-eye view of the valley. Spend the evening exploring the serene surroundings and local markets.

days.title: Auli to Nainital
days.description: Drive to Nainital, a charming lakeside town nestled in the Kumaon hills. Visit Naini Lake, take a boat ride, and explore the bustling Mall Road. Visit the Naina Devi Temple, dedicated to the goddess Naina Devi, and enjoy the scenic beauty of the town.

days.title: Departure from Nainital
days.description: Spend the morning exploring the local markets for souvenirs like handmade crafts and woolen items. After breakfast, check out and depart for your onward journey, carrying memories of Uttarakhand's stunning landscapes and spiritual vibrancy.

INBOUND-20.overview: A 10-day journey through the scenic hill stations of Uttarakhand, featuring Mussoorie's colonial charm, Rishikesh's spiritual vibes, Auli's snow-capped vistas, and Nainital's serene lakes. The tour balances adventure, culture, and relaxation amidst the Himalayas.

days.title: Arrival in Mussoorie
days.description: Arrive in Dehradun (Jolly Grant Airport) or Delhi, then transfer to Mussoorie (approx. 3-4 hours by road). Check into your hotel and spend the evening exploring Mall Road, visiting Kempty Falls, or enjoying the panoramic views from Gun Hill via cable car.

days.title: Mussoorie Exploration
days.description: Morning visit to the historic Christ Church and St. Mary's Waverley Convent. Afternoon at the Camel's Back Road for a leisurely walk or horse ride. Evening at the Mussoorie Lake for boating and local snacks.

days.title: Mussoorie to Rishikesh
days.description: Drive to Rishikesh (approx. 4-5 hours) via Haridwar. Visit Triveni Ghat for the Ganga Aarti in the evening, followed by a stroll along the riverfront. Explore local markets for spiritual souvenirs.

days.title: Rishikesh Adventure & Spirituality
days.description: Morning yoga/meditation session at a local ashram. Afternoon adventure activities: white-water rafting (Grade II-III) or a visit to the Beatles Ashram. Evening at Laxman Jhula for sunset views and street food.

days.title: Rishikesh to Auli
days.description: Early morning drive to Joshimath (approx. 5-6 hours), then take the cable car to Auli. Check into a resort with Himalayan views. Afternoon at Auli Lake or a short trek to nearby meadows. Evening bonfire and local Garhwali cuisine.

days.title: Auli Sightseeing & Adventure
days.description: Morning visit to Chenab Lake and Auli Ski Resort (summer activities like ropeway or trekking). Afternoon at the Nanda Devi National Park viewpoint. Evening stargazing with hot chocolate.

days.title: Auli to Nainital
days.description: Drive to Nainital via Ranikhet (approx. 8-9 hours). En route, stop at Kumaon’s scenic spots like Chaubatia Gardens. Check into a lakeside hotel and explore the Mall Road at night.

days.title: Nainital Exploration
days.description: Morning boat ride on Naini Lake, visit Naina Devi Temple, and explore Eco Cave Gardens. Afternoon at Snow View Point via cable car or a short trek. Evening at Mall Road for shopping and local delicacies like Bal Mithai.

days.title: Nainital to Delhi
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or a lakeside walk. Drive to Delhi (approx. 6-7 hours) with a stop at Murthal for parathas. Overnight in Delhi.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Morning at leisure for breakfast and last-minute sightseeing (e.g., Humayun’s Tomb or India Gate). Transfer to Indira Gandhi International Airport for departure.

INBOUND-22.overview: A 10-day cultural and wildlife journey through Gujarat, exploring its imperial heritage, sacred sites, and natural wonders. Starting in Ahmedabad, the state's largest city, the tour ventures into the historic Kutch region, visits revered pilgrimage destinations like Dwarka and Somnath, encounters the last Asiatic lions in Gir National Park, and concludes in culturally rich Vadodara.

days.title: Arrival in Ahmedabad
days.description: Arrive in Ahmedabad, Gujarat's largest city. Explore the historic Old City, visit the iconic Jama Masjid, and stroll through the bustling streets of the Pols (traditional neighborhoods). Overnight in Ahmedabad.

days.title: Ahmedabad Sightseeing
days.description: Visit the Sabarmati Ashram, Gandhi's former residence, and the Adalaj Stepwell. Explore the Sanskar Kendra and the Calico Museum of Textiles. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Ahmedabad.

days.title: Ahmedabad to Bhuj
days.description: Travel to Bhuj (approx. 6-7 hours by road). En route, visit the ancient town of Modhera with its stunning Sun Temple. Arrive in Bhuj, explore the Aina Mahal and Prag Mahal. Overnight in Bhuj.

days.title: Bhuj Sightseeing
days.description: Explore the Kutch region's crafts and culture. Visit the Kutch Museum, Sharad Baug Palace, and the local handicraft markets. Optional: Visit the Great Rann of Kutch (seasonal). Overnight in Bhuj.

days.title: Bhuj to Dwarka
days.description: Travel to Dwarka (approx. 5-6 hours by road). Visit the Dwarkadhish Temple, one of the Char Dham pilgrimage sites. Explore the Bet Dwarka Island and its temples. Overnight in Dwarka.

days.title: Dwarka to Somnath
days.description: Travel to Somnath (approx. 4 hours by road). Visit the Somnath Temple, one of the most sacred Shiva temples in India. Explore the nearby Triveni Sangam and the Somnath Museum. Overnight in Somnath.

days.title: Somnath to Gir National Park
days.description: Travel to Gir National Park (approx. 4 hours by road). Afternoon safari to spot the Asiatic lions and other wildlife. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Gir.

days.title: Gir National Park Safari
days.description: Morning and evening safaris in Gir National Park to observe lions, leopards, and other wildlife. Visit the Devalia Safari Park (optional). Overnight in Gir.

days.title: Gir to Rajkot
days.description: Travel to Rajkot (approx. 3 hours by road). Visit the Watson Museum, Rashtriyashala, and the Jubilee Garden. Explore the local markets. Overnight in Rajkot.

days.title: Rajkot to Vadodara & Departure
days.description: Travel to Vadodara (approx. 4 hours by road). Visit the Laxmi Vilas Palace, Sayaji Baug, and the EME Temple. Afternoon at leisure before departure from Vadodara.

INBOUND-25.overview: An 8-day cultural and scenic journey through Karnataka's elevated landscapes, from Bengaluru's urban charm to Hampi's ancient ruins and Badami's historic caves.

days.title: Arrival in Bengaluru
days.description: Arrive in Bengaluru, transfer to hotel. Explore the city's highlights including Lalbagh Botanical Garden, Vidhana Soudha, and MG Road for shopping and local cuisine.

days.title: Bengaluru to Mysore
days.description: Drive to Mysore (3 hours). Visit Mysore Palace, Brindavan Gardens, and Chamundi Hill. Evening stroll in Devaraja Market for silk and sandalwood souvenirs.

days.title: Mysore to Coorg
days.description: Morning drive to Coorg (5-6 hours). Stop at Srirangapatna and Ranganathittu Bird Sanctuary. Arrive in Coorg, explore local coffee plantations and scenic viewpoints like Raja's Seat.

days.title: Exploring Coorg
days.description: Full day in Coorg: Visit Abbey Falls, Talacauvery (origin of River Kaveri), and Nisargadhama. Optional activities include trekking or wildlife spotting in Nagarhole National Park.

days.title: Coorg to Chikmagalur
days.description: Drive to Chikmagalur (4-5 hours). En route, visit Shivappa Nayaka Palace in Shimoga. Arrive in Chikmagalur, known for coffee plantations and the iconic Mullayanagiri peak.

days.title: Chikmagalur to Hampi
days.description: Morning drive to Hampi (4 hours). Explore the UNESCO-listed ruins: Virupaksha Temple, Vittala Temple, and the iconic Stone Chariot. Sunset at Matanga Hill for panoramic views.

days.title: Exploring Hampi
days.description: Full day in Hampi: Visit Lotus Mahal, Royal Enclosure, and ancient markets. Optional coracle ride on the Tungabhadra River or visit nearby Anegundi village.

days.title: Hampi to Badami & Departure
days.description: Morning drive to Badami (3 hours). Visit Badami Caves, Agastya Lake, and the historic Bhutanatha Temples. Afternoon departure from Badami or Bengaluru (depending on flight/train schedule).

INBOUND-28.overview: Experience the pristine beauty of Lakshadweep with this 7-day island-hopping tour. Explore turquoise lagoons, coral reefs, and serene beaches while enjoying water sports and local culture.

days.title: Arrival in Agatti Island
days.description: Arrive at Agatti Airport and transfer to your resort. Relax on the white sandy beach and enjoy a welcome drink while soaking in the island vibes.

days.title: Agatti – Snorkeling & Beach Walk
days.description: Embark on a snorkeling adventure at the coral reefs near Agatti. Later, take a leisurely beach walk and visit the local fish market to see the day's catch.

days.title: Agatti to Bangaram Island
days.description: Take a speedboat to Bangaram Island, known for its untouched beauty. Spend the day swimming, sunbathing, and exploring the lagoon by kayak.

days.title: Bangaram – Dolphin Sighting & Picnic
days.description: Join a boat tour for dolphin sighting and visit the nearby uninhabited Parali Island for a picnic. Enjoy snorkeling and beach games in the afternoon.

days.title: Bangaram to Kadmat Island
days.description: Travel to Kadmat Island and check into your beachfront resort. Spend the evening strolling along the shore and watching the sunset over the Arabian Sea.

days.title: Kadmat – Glass-Bottom Boat Ride
days.description: Take a glass-bottom boat ride to explore the vibrant coral reefs without getting wet. Later, try kayaking or paddleboarding in the calm waters.

days.title: Departure from Agatti
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Agatti Airport for your departure. Carry memories of Lakshadweep’s pristine beaches and marine life.

INBOUND-29.overview: A 10-day immersive tour exploring the pristine islands of Lakshadweep, featuring serene beaches, vibrant coral reefs, and rich marine biodiversity. The itinerary includes island hopping from Agatti to Bangaram, Kadmat, and Kavaratti, with activities like snorkeling, kayaking, and cultural experiences.

days.title: Arrival in Agatti Island
days.description: Arrive at Agatti Airport (AGX) and transfer to your resort. Spend the day relaxing on the beach and acclimatizing to the tropical environment. Enjoy a welcome dinner with local cuisine.

days.title: Explore Agatti Island
days.description: Morning: Visit the Agatti Marine Aquarium and local fish landing center. Afternoon: Snorkeling at the house reef or a glass-bottom boat tour. Evening: Cultural performance by local artists.

days.title: Transfer to Bangaram Island
days.description: Morning: Speedboat transfer to Bangaram Island (approx. 2-3 hours). Afternoon: Relax on the pristine white-sand beaches and explore the island's lagoon. Evening: Sunset cruise and stargazing.

days.title: Bangaram Island - Adventure & Relaxation
days.description: Morning: Snorkeling or scuba diving at the coral reefs. Afternoon: Kayaking or paddleboarding in the lagoon. Evening: Bonfire and beachside dinner.

days.title: Transfer to Kadmat Island
days.description: Morning: Speedboat transfer to Kadmat Island (approx. 2 hours). Afternoon: Relax on the beach or explore the island's coconut groves. Evening: Traditional Lakshadweep dance and music performance.

days.title: Kadmat Island - Water Sports & Nature
days.description: Morning: Snorkeling or diving at the vibrant coral reefs. Afternoon: Visit the local fishing village and learn about traditional livelihoods. Evening: Relax at the resort with a sunset view.

days.title: Kadmat Island - Leisure Day
days.description: Full day at leisure to enjoy the beach, water sports, or spa treatments. Optional: Deep-sea fishing or a guided island tour.

days.title: Transfer to Kavaratti Island
days.description: Morning: Speedboat transfer to Kavaratti Island (approx. 3 hours). Afternoon: Visit the Ujra Mosque and local markets. Evening: Sunset at the beach and cultural evening.

days.title: Kavaratti Island - Culture & Exploration
days.description: Morning: Visit the Marine Aquarium and local handicraft centers. Afternoon: Snorkeling at the coral reefs or a boat tour to nearby uninhabited islands. Evening: Farewell dinner with local delicacies.

days.title: Departure from Kavaratti
days.description: Morning: Check out and transfer to Kavaratti Airport for departure. End of the tour.

INBOUND-30.overview: This 7-day tour explores the cultural and historical gems of South India, starting in the serene French-colonial town of Pondicherry, followed by the ancient coastal town of Mahabalipuram, and concluding in the bustling metropolis of Chennai. Experience tranquil beaches, UNESCO-listed temples, and vibrant local markets while immersing in the region's rich heritage.

days.title: Arrival in Pondicherry
days.description: Arrive in Pondicherry and check into a heritage hotel in the French Quarter. Spend the evening strolling along the promenade, visiting the iconic Promenade Beach, and enjoying a relaxed dinner at a local café.

days.title: Pondicherry sightseeing
days.description: Explore Pondicherry’s colonial architecture with visits to the Aurobindo Ashram, Sri Aurobindo Temple, and the serene Auroville community. End the day with a visit to the vibrant Paradise Beach for sunset views.

days.title: Pondicherry to Mahabalipuram
days.description: Drive to Mahabalipuram, stopping en route at the Gingee Fort for panoramic views. Upon arrival, visit the Shore Temple and the Five Rathas, marveling at the 7th-century rock-cut architecture.

days.title: Mahabalipuram exploration
days.description: Spend the day exploring Mahabalipuram’s UNESCO-listed monuments, including the Arjuna’s Penance relief and the Krishna’s Butterball. Relax at the golden Mahabalipuram Beach in the evening.

days.title: Mahabalipuram to Chennai
days.description: Travel to Chennai, visiting the DakshinaChitra Heritage Village to experience South Indian rural life. In Chennai, explore the historic Fort St. George and Marina Beach.

days.title: Chennai cultural tour
days.description: Visit the Kapaleeshwarar Temple and the Parthasarathy Temple, showcasing Dravidian temple architecture. Enjoy a traditional South Indian lunch and explore the bustling markets of T Nagar.

days.title: Departure from Chennai
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Chennai International Airport for departure. The tour concludes with fond memories of South India’s rich culture and heritage.

INBOUND-33.overview: Discover the serene coastal charm of Pondicherry, a former French colony blending Tamil culture with colonial elegance. This 6-day itinerary explores pristine beaches, vibrant ashrams, historic landmarks, and tranquil backwaters, offering a perfect mix of relaxation and cultural immersion.

days.title: Arrival in Pondicherry
days.description: Arrive in Pondicherry and check into your hotel. Spend the evening strolling along the promenade, visiting the iconic Promenade Beach, and enjoying the French Quarter's charming architecture. Dinner at a local café to savor Pondicherry's unique Franco-Tamil cuisine.

days.title: Exploring the French Quarter & Auroville
days.description: Morning: Explore the French Quarter with visits to the Sri Aurobindo Ashram, Auroville Matrimandir, and the Botanical Garden. Afternoon: Relax at Auroville's beaches or participate in a pottery workshop. Evening: Return to Pondicherry for a cultural show or live music at a local venue.

days.title: Beach Hopping & Water Activities
days.description: Morning: Visit Paradise Beach via boat from Chunnambar. Afternoon: Enjoy water sports like kayaking or paddleboarding at Serenity Beach. Evening: Sunset at Auroville Beach followed by a beachside dinner.

days.title: Historical & Spiritual Pondicherry
days.description: Morning: Visit the 18th-century Gingee Fort and the sacred Gingee Murugan Temple. Afternoon: Explore the Pondicherry Museum and the Old Lighthouse. Evening: Attend a yoga or meditation session at a local wellness center.

days.title: Backwaters & Local Culture
days.description: Morning: Take a boat ride through the backwaters of Chunnambar. Afternoon: Visit the local markets for handloom textiles and handicrafts. Evening: Enjoy a traditional Tamil meal at a heritage home or a rooftop restaurant.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Morning: Leisurely breakfast and last-minute shopping for souvenirs like French perfumes or handmade crafts. Depart Pondicherry with cherished memories of its coastal charm.

INBOUND-35.overview: A 7-day immersive journey through Goa, blending cultural exploration, creative workshops, and coastal relaxation. Experience the vibrant spirit of Goa through animation art, local traditions, and serene beaches.

days.title: Arrival in Goa
days.description: Arrive in Goa, check into a beachfront resort in North Goa. Spend the evening exploring Panjim's Latin Quarter, visiting the iconic Fontainhas, and enjoying a welcome dinner with Goan cuisine.

days.title: Goa's Cultural & Artistic Heritage
days.description: Morning: Visit the Goa State Museum and Old Goa churches. Afternoon: Participate in a traditional Goan pottery workshop. Evening: Sunset at Miramar Beach followed by a cultural performance of Goan folk dances.

days.title: Animation & Storytelling Workshop
days.description: Full-day animation workshop led by local artists. Learn basics of 2D animation and storyboarding. Evening: Relax at Calangute Beach with a bonfire and live music.

days.title: Exploring South Goa
days.description: Day trip to South Goa: Visit the majestic Dudhsagar Waterfalls, explore the spice plantations of Savoi, and relax at Colva Beach. Evening: Dinner at a beach shack with ocean views.

days.title: Creative Goa: Art & Nature
days.description: Morning: Sketching session at the Goa College of Art. Afternoon: Visit the Sahakari Spice Farm for a sensory tour. Evening: Sunset cruise on the Mandovi River with dinner.

days.title: Beach Day & Local Crafts
days.description: Morning: Free time at Palolem Beach. Afternoon: Visit local artisans in Loutolim to learn about Goan handicrafts. Evening: Farewell dinner at a beachfront restaurant featuring Goan seafood specialties.

days.title: Departure from Goa
days.description: Morning: Leisurely breakfast and last-minute shopping at Anjuna Flea Market (if timing permits). Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-37.overview: A rejuvenating 10-day tour through Goa, blending serene beaches, vibrant culture, and wellness retreats. Experience tranquil sunsets, Ayurvedic therapies, and local flavors while exploring Goa’s diverse landscapes and heritage.

days.title: Arrival in Goa – Welcome to Paradise
days.description: Arrive at Goa’s international airport or railway station and transfer to your beachfront resort in North Goa. Relax and unwind with a welcome drink and light refreshments as you settle into your accommodation.

days.title: North Goa Beaches – Anjuna & Vagator
days.description: Spend the day exploring the iconic beaches of Anjuna and Vagator. Enjoy water sports like parasailing or jet skiing, and visit the famous Chapora Fort for panoramic views of the Arabian Sea.

days.title: Ayurvedic Wellness Retreat
days.description: Begin a day of holistic healing with an Ayurvedic consultation followed by a full-body massage and herbal steam therapy. Enjoy a nutritious Ayurvedic lunch and unwind in the serene retreat setting.

days.title: Old Goa Exploration – Churches & History
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Basilica of Bom Jesus and Se Cathedral, marveling at Portuguese architecture and the sacred relic of St. Francis Xavier. Explore the Latin Quarter and its colonial charm.

days.title: Spice Plantation Tour – Savoi & Sahakari
days.description: Take a scenic drive through lush spice plantations in Ponda, learning about Goa’s spice trade. Enjoy a traditional Goan lunch and witness the processing of cashews and spices firsthand.

days.title: South Goa Beaches – Palolem & Colva
days.description: Discover the quieter beaches of South Goa, where golden sands meet swaying palms. Relax with a beachside massage or try dolphin-watching in Palolem before enjoying fresh seafood for dinner.

days.title: Yoga & Meditation by the Sea
days.description: Join a sunrise yoga session on a secluded beach, followed by guided meditation to rejuvenate the mind and body. Spend the afternoon exploring local markets for handmade souvenirs.

days.title: Cruise & Sunset Party – Mandovi River
days.description: Embark on a sunset cruise along the Mandovi River, enjoying live music and scenic views. Later, join a lively beach party in Baga or Candolim with dancing and Goan cuisine.

days.title: Cultural Immersion – Fontainhas & Feni Tasting
days.description: Wander through Fontainhas, Goa’s Latin Quarter, with its colorful Portuguese villas and art galleries. End the day with a feni tasting session, sampling this traditional Goan spirit.

days.title: Departure – Fond Farewell
days.description: After breakfast, check out and transfer to the airport or railway station for your onward journey. Take home cherished memories of Goa’s beauty, culture, and tranquility.

INBOUND-38.overview: Experience the breathtaking landscapes and serene beauty of Jammu & Kashmir with this 10-day itinerary. Explore the vibrant Dal Lake in Srinagar, indulge in thrilling adventures in Gulmarg, and immerse yourself in the pristine meadows of Pahalgam. This journey promises a perfect blend of nature, culture, and relaxation.

days.title: Arrival in Srinagar
days.description: Arrive at Srinagar International Airport or railway station. Check into a houseboat on Dal Lake or a hotel. Explore the local markets and enjoy a traditional Kashmiri dinner.

days.title: Explore Srinagar
days.description: Visit Mughal Gardens (Shalimar Bagh, Nishat Bagh, and Chashme Shahi). Take a shikara ride on Dal Lake and visit the Hazratbal Shrine. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
days.description: Drive to Gulmarg (2.5 hours). Enjoy the scenic beauty and explore the meadows. Visit the Gondola for panoramic views of the Himalayas. Relax in the evening.

days.title: Adventure in Gulmarg
days.description: Engage in adventure activities like skiing (seasonal), horse riding, or golfing. Explore the Alpather Lake and enjoy the serene surroundings.

days.title: Gulmarg to Pahalgam
days.description: Drive to Pahalgam (5-6 hours). Check into a hotel/resort. Visit the Lidder River and enjoy the scenic beauty. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Pahalgam Exploration
days.description: Visit Betaab Valley, Aru Valley, and Chandanwari. Enjoy a horse ride or trekking in the lush green meadows. Relax by the Lidder River.

days.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar
days.description: Drive back to Srinagar (2.5 hours). Visit the Shankaracharya Temple and explore the local markets. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Srinagar Leisure Day
days.description: Optional activities like a houseboat stay, visit to Wular Lake, or a day trip to Sonamarg. Enjoy local cuisine and cultural experiences.

days.title: Shopping & Souvenirs
days.description: Visit local markets for Pashmina shawls, saffron, and handicrafts. Enjoy a farewell dinner with traditional Kashmiri Wazwan cuisine.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Check out and transfer to the airport/railway station for departure.

INBOUND-39.overview: Experience the breathtaking beauty and rich culture of Jammu & Kashmir with this 7-day itinerary. Starting in Srinagar, explore serene lakes, lush gardens, and the majestic Himalayas. This tour includes cultural experiences, scenic cruises, and visits to iconic landmarks.

days.title: Arrival in Srinagar
days.description: Arrive in Srinagar, the summer capital of Jammu & Kashmir. Check into a houseboat on Dal Lake and enjoy a traditional Kashmiri welcome dinner. Relax and soak in the serene ambiance of the lake.

days.title: Explore Srinagar - Lakes & Gardens
days.description: Visit the iconic Dal Lake and Shalimar Bagh. Enjoy a shikara ride on the lake, explore the floating vegetable market, and stroll through the Mughal gardens. In the evening, attend a cultural performance.

days.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
days.description: Travel to Gulmarg, known as the 'Meadow of Flowers.' Enjoy a cable car ride to Apharwat Peak for panoramic views of the Himalayas. Spend the day exploring the scenic landscapes and indulging in adventure activities like skiing (seasonal).

days.title: Gulmarg to Pahalgam
days.description: Drive to Pahalgam, a picturesque hill station. Visit the Betaab Valley and enjoy a horse ride along the Lidder River. Explore the pristine surroundings and relax in the tranquility of nature.

days.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar
days.description: Return to Srinagar and visit the historic Hazratbal Shrine and the bustling local markets. Enjoy a leisurely evening at a lakeside café or explore the local cuisine.

days.title: Srinagar - Cultural & Local Experiences
days.description: Visit the Mughal-era Jama Masjid, the ancient Shankaracharya Temple, and the vibrant local markets. Participate in a cooking class to learn about Kashmiri cuisine and enjoy a farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Srinagar
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey. Relish the memories of your delightful Jammu & Kashmir tour.

INBOUND-40.overview: Experience the royal heritage of India aboard the Maharaja's Express. This 7-day journey takes you through the vibrant cities of Jaipur, the wildlife haven of Ranthambore, the iconic Taj Mahal in Agra, the historic Orchha, the spiritual city of Varanasi, and concludes in the bustling capital, Delhi. Enjoy luxurious accommodations, gourmet dining, and exclusive experiences on this opulent rail tour.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
days.description: Arrive in Jaipur, the Pink City, and transfer to the Maharaja's Express. Enjoy a welcome drink and light refreshments. Later, embark on a guided tour of the city, visiting the Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and Jantar Mantar. Return to the train for dinner and an overnight stay.

days.title: Jaipur to Ranthambore
days.description: Morning departure to Ranthambore. Upon arrival, enjoy a wildlife safari in Ranthambore National Park, known for its Bengal tigers. Return to the train for lunch and a short journey to Agra. Evening at leisure on board.

days.title: Ranthambore to Agra
days.description: Morning arrival in Agra. Visit the iconic Taj Mahal at sunrise, followed by the Agra Fort. Afternoon at leisure to explore local markets. Return to the train for dinner and an overnight journey to Orchha.

days.title: Agra to Orchha
days.description: Morning arrival in Orchha. Explore the historic town, visiting Orchha Fort, Jahangir Mahal, and Ram Raja Temple. Afternoon at leisure to enjoy the scenic beauty of the Betwa River. Evening departure to Varanasi.

days.title: Orchha to Varanasi
days.description: Morning arrival in Varanasi, the spiritual heart of India. Embark on a guided tour of the ghats, including the Dashashwamedh Ghat and Kashi Vishwanath Temple. Evening Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat. Overnight stay on the train.

days.title: Varanasi to Delhi
days.description: Morning at leisure to explore Varanasi further or relax. Afternoon departure to Delhi. Evening at leisure on board. Arrive in Delhi the next morning.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Morning arrival in Delhi. After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey.

INBOUND-41.overview: A 6-day cultural and heritage tour exploring the jewels of South India, covering historical cities like Mysore, Kanchipuram, Thanjavur, Cochin, and Chertala before returning to Bengaluru.

days.title: Arrival in Bengaluru & Travel to Mysore
days.description: Arrive in Bengaluru, transfer to Mysore (3-4 hours by road). Visit Mysore Palace, Chamundi Hills, and the vibrant Devaraja Market. Overnight stay in Mysore.

days.title: Mysore to Kanchipuram
days.description: Morning drive to Kanchipuram (5-6 hours). Explore the ancient temples including Kailasanathar Temple and Ekambareswarar Temple. Visit the silk weaving centers. Overnight in Kanchipuram.

days.title: Kanchipuram to Thanjavur
days.description: Drive to Thanjavur (4-5 hours). Visit the Brihadeeswarar Temple, Thanjavur Palace, and Saraswathi Mahal Library. Enjoy a traditional Tanjore painting workshop. Overnight in Thanjavur.

days.title: Thanjavur to Cochin
days.description: Morning flight to Cochin (1.5 hours). Explore Fort Kochi, Jewish Synagogue, and Chinese fishing nets. Evening cultural performance of Kathakali dance. Overnight in Cochin.

days.title: Cochin to Chertala & Travel to Bengaluru
days.description: Morning drive to Chertala (1.5 hours). Visit the backwaters and houseboat experience. Afternoon transfer to Bengaluru (6-7 hours by road). Overnight in Bengaluru.

days.title: Departure from Bengaluru
days.description: Morning at leisure. Transfer to Bengaluru airport for departure.

INBOUND-43.overview: Embark on an 8-day journey through India's royal heritage, from the wildlife of Ranthambore to the iconic Taj Mahal, vibrant palaces of Rajasthan, and ancient caves of Maharashtra. This tour blends history, culture, and adventure across six iconic cities.

days.title: Arrival in Sawai Madhopur
days.description: Arrive at Sawai Madhopur, gateway to Ranthambore National Park. Check into a heritage hotel and relax before an evening jungle safari to spot Bengal tigers and other wildlife.

days.title: Sawai Madhopur – Ranthambore Safari
days.description: Enjoy two safaris in Ranthambore National Park, exploring its dense forests and historic ruins. Spot tigers, leopards, and diverse bird species amid scenic landscapes.

days.title: Agra – Taj Mahal & Fort
days.description: Travel to Agra and visit the breathtaking Taj Mahal at sunrise. Explore Agra Fort and the serene Mehtab Bagh for stunning views of the monument.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Palaces & Markets
days.description: Discover Jaipur’s royal heritage with visits to Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Stroll through Johari Bazaar for vibrant textiles and jewelry.

days.title: Jaipur – Pink City Exploration
days.description: Explore Jantar Mantar, an astronomical marvel, and the grand Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a cultural evening with traditional Rajasthani dance and music.

days.title: Udaipur – Lakes & Palaces
days.description: Visit the City Palace and serene Lake Pichola, taking a boat ride to Jag Mandir Island. Explore Jagdish Temple and stroll through the colorful bazaars.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ajanta & Ellora Caves
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad and explore the UNESCO-listed Ajanta and Ellora Caves, showcasing ancient rock-cut temples and Buddhist art.

days.title: Mumbai – Departure
days.description: Transfer to Mumbai for departure. If time permits, visit the Gateway of India or Colaba Causeway for last-minute shopping before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-45.overview: Explore the cultural and natural wonders of Madhya Pradesh on this 8-day tour, featuring heritage sites, hill stations, and wildlife sanctuaries. From the lakes of Bhopal to the serene landscapes of Pachmarhi, and the tiger reserves of Kanha, this itinerary offers a blend of history, nature, and adventure.

days.title: Arrival in Bhopal – Lakes and Heritage
days.description: Arrive in Bhopal, the capital of Madhya Pradesh, known as the 'City of Lakes.' Visit the iconic Upper Lake and Lower Lake, and explore the historic Taj-ul-Masajid, one of India's largest mosques. Enjoy a cultural evening with local cuisine at a traditional restaurant.

days.title: Bhopal to Pachmarhi – Hill Station Arrival
days.description: Travel to Pachmarhi, a scenic hill station nestled in the Satpura Range. Visit the Pandava Caves, believed to be the hiding place of the Pandavas from the Mahabharata. Explore the charming town and enjoy the cool climate and lush greenery.

days.title: Pachmarhi – Waterfalls and Viewpoints
days.description: Discover the natural beauty of Pachmarhi with visits to the stunning Bee Falls and Rajat Prapat (Silver Falls). Hike to the highest point, Dhupgarh, for breathtaking sunrise views. Explore the ancient Jata Shankar Cave and enjoy a peaceful evening in the hills.

days.title: Pachmarhi to Kanha – Wildlife Safari Prep
days.description: Drive to Kanha National Park, one of India's premier tiger reserves. En route, stop at the historic town of Mandla to visit the ancient Ghanteshwar Temple. Arrive at Kanha and prepare for the safari with a briefing on park rules and wildlife spotting tips.

days.title: Kanha – Morning and Evening Safaris
days.description: Embark on thrilling jeep safaris into Kanha National Park to spot Bengal tigers, leopards, and other wildlife. Visit the Kanha Museum to learn about the park's flora and fauna. Enjoy the serene beauty of the meadows and sal forests during the safaris.

days.title: Kanha – Nature Walks and Villages
days.description: Take a guided nature walk through the buffer zone of Kanha to observe smaller wildlife and birdlife. Visit nearby tribal villages to experience local culture and traditions. Relax at the resort and enjoy the natural surroundings.

days.title: Kanha to Jabalpur – Marble Rocks and Temples
days.description: Travel to Jabalpur, stopping at the stunning Dhuandhar Falls and the Bhedaghat Marble Rocks. Visit the ancient Rani Durgavati Museum and the historic Madan Mahal Fort. Enjoy a boat ride on the Narmada River for a scenic view of the marble cliffs.

days.title: Departure from Jabalpur
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Jabalpur Airport or Railway Station for your onward journey. Reflect on the memorable experiences of wildlife, heritage, and nature from this tour of Madhya Pradesh.

INBOUND-47.overview: Experience the rich cultural heritage and royal grandeur of Maharashtra on this 8-day luxury train journey. Explore ancient caves, UNESCO World Heritage sites, and vibrant cities aboard the Deccan Odyssey.

days.title: Arrival in Mumbai – Gateway to India
days.description: Arrive in Mumbai and board the Deccan Odyssey. Enjoy a welcome drink and light refreshments before a guided tour of the iconic Gateway of India and Colaba Causeway.

days.title: Nashik – Wine & Spirituality
days.description: Visit the ancient Kalaram Temple and Sula Vineyards for a wine tasting experience. Explore the serene Godavari Ghat and local markets in Nashik.

days.title: Aurangabad – Cave Temples & History
days.description: Explore the UNESCO-listed Ellora Caves and Aurangabad Caves. Visit the Bibi Ka Maqbara, a miniature Taj Mahal, and the historic Daulatabad Fort.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ajanta & Ellora Exploration
days.description: Spend the day at the Ajanta Caves, known for their intricate Buddhist murals and carvings. Return to the train for a cultural evening with folk performances.

days.title: Kolhapur – Royal Heritage & Temples
days.description: Visit the Mahalaxmi Temple and the historic New Palace. Explore the vibrant bazaars and savor Kolhapur’s famous spicy cuisine.

days.title: Goa – Beaches & Portuguese Charm
days.description: Discover Goa’s colonial architecture in Old Goa and relax at a beachside resort. Enjoy a sunset cruise along the Mandovi River.

days.title: Sindhudurg – Forts & Coastal Views
days.description: Explore the majestic Sindhudurg Fort, built by Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. Enjoy a scenic boat ride and local seafood delicacies.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Disembark the Deccan Odyssey after breakfast. Transfer to the airport for your onward journey, carrying memories of Maharashtra’s splendor.

INBOUND-48.overview: A 12-day immersive journey through Madhya Pradesh, exploring its cultural heritage, wildlife, and natural wonders. Starting in Bhopal, the state capital, the tour ventures into the Satpura Range at Pachmarhi, encounters tigers in Kanha National Park, visits the marble rocks of Jabalpur, marvels at the UNESCO-listed Khajuraho temples, explores the historic town of Orchha, and concludes in the royal city of Gwalior.

days.title: Arrival in Bhopal
days.description: Arrive in Bhopal, the capital of Madhya Pradesh. Check into your hotel and relax after your journey. In the evening, explore the Upper Lake (Bhojtaal) and enjoy a boat ride. Visit the Van Vihar National Park to spot local wildlife. Overnight in Bhopal.

days.title: Bhopal City Tour
days.description: After breakfast, visit the Taj-ul-Masajid, one of India's largest mosques. Explore the State Museum to learn about the region's history and culture. Visit the Birla Museum and the Shaukat Mahal. In the afternoon, head to the Tribal Museum to understand the indigenous cultures of Madhya Pradesh. Overnight in Bhopal.

days.title: Bhopal to Pachmarhi
days.description: Drive to Pachmarhi, the 'Queen of Satpura,' a hill station in the Satpura Range. En route, stop at the UNESCO-listed Rock Shelters of Bhimbetka, showcasing prehistoric cave paintings. Arrive in Pachmarhi and check into your hotel. Explore the town's colonial-era architecture and visit the Pandava Caves. Overnight in Pachmarhi.

days.title: Exploring Pachmarhi
days.description: After breakfast, visit the stunning waterfalls of Pachmarhi, including the Big Falls (Duchess Falls) and the Bee Falls. Explore the Satpura National Park for a jungle safari to spot wildlife like leopards, sloth bears, and various bird species. Visit the Mahadeo Hills and the Jata Shankar Caves. Overnight in Pachmarhi.

days.title: Pachmarhi to Kanha National Park
days.description: Drive to Kanha National Park, one of India's premier tiger reserves. En route, stop at the Narmada River for a brief visit to the Omkareshwar Temple. Arrive in Kanha and check into your jungle lodge. In the evening, attend a briefing on the park's wildlife and safari protocols. Overnight in Kanha.

days.title: Kanha National Park Safari
days.description: Early morning, embark on a jeep safari in Kanha National Park to spot Bengal tigers, barasingha (swamp deer), and other wildlife. After a packed breakfast in the park, return to the lodge for lunch. In the afternoon, enjoy another safari session. Overnight in Kanha.

days.title: Kanha to Jabalpur
days.description: After breakfast, drive to Jabalpur, a historic city on the banks of the Narmada River. En route, visit the Marble Rocks at Bhedaghat, a stunning gorge with white marble cliffs. Take a boat ride on the Narmada River to witness the beauty of the Marble Rocks. Arrive in Jabalpur and check into your hotel. Overnight in Jabalpur.

days.title: Jabalpur City Tour
days.description: After breakfast, visit the Dhuandhar Falls, a breathtaking waterfall on the Narmada River. Explore the Madan Mahal Fort, a 12th-century fort with panoramic views of the city. Visit the Rani Durgavati Museum to learn about the region's history. In the evening, relax by the river. Overnight in Jabalpur.

days.title: Jabalpur to Khajuraho
days.description: Drive to Khajuraho, famous for its UNESCO-listed group of 10th-century Hindu and Jain temples adorned with intricate carvings. Arrive in Khajuraho and check into your hotel. In the evening, visit the Sound and Light Show at the Western Group of Temples to learn about the history of Khajuraho. Overnight in Khajuraho.

days.title: Exploring Khajuraho Temples
days.description: After breakfast, explore the Western Group of Temples, including the Kandariya Mahadev Temple, Lakshmana Temple, and Devi Jagdambi Temple. Visit the Eastern Group of Temples, which includes the Jain temples. In the afternoon, visit the Archaeological Museum to see artifacts from the temple complex. Overnight in Khajuraho.

days.title: Khajuraho to Orchha
days.description: Drive to Orchha, a historic town known for its well-preserved medieval architecture. En route, stop at the historic town of Chhatarpur for a brief visit. Arrive in Orchha and check into your hotel. Explore the town's landmarks, including the Orchha Fort Complex and the Jahangir Mahal. Overnight in Orchha.

days.title: Departure from Gwalior
days.description: Drive to Gwalior, a city steeped in history and culture. En route, visit the historic town of Datia and its 7-storeyed palace, the Bir Singh Palace. Arrive in Gwalior and check into your hotel. Visit the Gwalior Fort, the Jai Vilas Palace, and the Teli Ka Mandir. In the evening, transfer to the airport or railway station for your departure.

INBOUND-49.overview: Embark on an 8-day journey through India's royal heritage, exploring the vibrant cities of the Deccan region. From the cultural grandeur of Udaipur to the majestic forts of Rajasthan and the iconic Taj Mahal, this tour offers a blend of history, architecture, and local experiences.

days.title: Arrival in Vadodara
days.description: Arrive in Vadodara, a cultural hub known for its royal past and vibrant arts scene. Spend the evening exploring the city's local markets and enjoying traditional Gujarati cuisine.

days.title: Vadodara to Udaipur
days.description: Travel to Udaipur, the 'City of Lakes,' and visit the majestic City Palace and Jag Mandir Island. Enjoy a sunset boat ride on Lake Pichola to soak in the scenic beauty.

days.title: Udaipur Exploration
days.description: Explore Udaipur's historic sites, including the Jagdish Temple and Saheliyon-ki-Bari. Experience local crafts at Shilpgram and savor a traditional Rajasthani dinner.

days.title: Udaipur to Jodhpur
days.description: Drive to Jodhpur, the 'Blue City,' and visit the Mehrangarh Fort with its stunning views. Explore the bustling markets of the old city and try local street food.

days.title: Jodhpur to Jaipur
days.description: Travel to Jaipur, the 'Pink City,' and explore the Amber Fort and Hawa Mahal. Spend the evening shopping for jewelry and textiles in local bazaars.

days.title: Jaipur Exploration
days.description: Visit the City Palace, Jantar Mantar, and Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a cultural evening with traditional dance and music performances.

days.title: Jaipur to Agra
days.description: Journey to Agra and marvel at the iconic Taj Mahal at sunrise. Visit the Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh for a stunning view of the Taj.

days.title: Agra to Delhi, Departure
days.description: Travel to Delhi and visit the Qutub Minar and Humayun's Tomb before heading to the airport for departure. Reflect on the journey's highlights over a farewell meal.

INBOUND-50.overview: Experience the breathtaking landscapes and cultural richness of Himachal Pradesh on this 8-day journey. From the colonial charm of Shimla to the adventure hub of Manali, the serene Spiti Valley, and the stunning Chandratal Lake, this itinerary blends history, nature, and adventure.

days.title: Arrival in Shimla
days.description: Arrive in Shimla, the capital of Himachal Pradesh. Check into your hotel and spend the evening exploring the Ridge and Mall Road. Enjoy the colonial architecture and panoramic views of the Himalayas.

days.title: Shimla Sightseeing
days.description: Visit key attractions including Jakhu Temple, Kufri, and Christ Church. Spend the afternoon shopping for local handicrafts and enjoying the scenic beauty of the region.

days.title: Shimla to Manali
days.description: Drive from Shimla to Manali (approx. 7-8 hours). En route, stop at places like Narkanda and Karchham. Arrive in Manali and check into your hotel. Relax and explore the local markets in the evening.

days.title: Manali Local Sightseeing
days.description: Explore Manali's attractions including Hadimba Temple, Solang Valley (weather permitting), and the Old Manali market. Optional activities include paragliding or river rafting for adventure enthusiasts.

days.title: Manali to Kaza
days.description: Embark on a scenic drive from Manali to Kaza (approx. 6-7 hours). Pass through Rohtang Pass (if open) and the stunning Spiti Valley. Arrive in Kaza and check into your hotel. Explore the local monastery and market.

days.title: Kaza Exploration
days.description: Visit key sites in Kaza including Key Monastery, Dhankar Monastery, and the Spiti River. Enjoy the unique culture and landscapes of the Spiti Valley. Optional activities include trekking or visiting nearby villages.

days.title: Kaza to Chandratal Lake
days.description: Drive to Chandratal Lake (approx. 5-6 hours). En route, stop at places like Batal and Kunzum Pass. Arrive at the pristine Chandratal Lake, known for its crescent shape and stunning reflections. Camp overnight near the lake.

days.title: Departure from Kaza
days.description: After breakfast, drive back to Kaza (approx. 2 hours). Depending on your flight/train schedule, you may have time for last-minute shopping or a short visit to a local monastery before heading to your onward destination.

INBOUND-51.overview: An 8-day wildlife and heritage journey through Maharashtra, exploring ancient caves, tiger reserves, and cultural landmarks. Experience the state's diverse landscapes from bustling Mumbai to serene Ramtek and thrilling Tadoba National Park.

days.title: Arrival in Mumbai – Gateway to India
days.description: Arrive in Mumbai, India's financial hub, and check into your hotel. Explore the iconic Gateway of India and take a ferry to the historic Elephanta Caves, known for its ancient rock-cut temples.

days.title: Mumbai – Colonial Heritage Walk
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus and the colonial-era Flora Fountain. Stroll through the bustling Crawford Market and enjoy a traditional seafood lunch at a local café.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ajanta Caves Exploration
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad and explore the UNESCO-listed Ajanta Caves, featuring 2,000-year-old Buddhist murals and carvings. Later, visit the nearby Ellora Caves, showcasing rock-cut temples from the 6th to 11th centuries.

days.title: Ramtek – Wildlife & Temples
days.description: Drive to Ramtek and visit the ancient Ramtek Temple, dedicated to Lord Rama. Explore the serene Pench Tiger Reserve nearby, known for its lush forests and diverse wildlife, including tigers and leopards.

days.title: Tadoba – Jungle Safari Adventure
days.description: Head to Tadoba Andhari Tiger Reserve for a thrilling jeep safari, one of India's best tiger reserves. Spot Bengal tigers, sloth bears, and a variety of bird species in the dense teak forests.

days.title: Jalgaon – Ancient Caves & Forts
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Ajanta Caves again for a deeper exploration, followed by a trip to the historic Daulatabad Fort near Aurangabad. Enjoy local Maharashtrian cuisine for dinner.

days.title: Nashik – Wine & Spirituality
days.description: Explore Nashik’s vineyards with a wine-tasting tour at Sula or York Winery. Visit the ancient Kalaram Temple and the serene Ramkund, a sacred bathing spot on the Godavari River.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Mumbai for your onward journey. Enjoy a final shopping spree at Colaba Causeway or a relaxed stroll along Marine Drive before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-55.overview: Embark on an 8-day Cultural Odyssey through India’s historic heartland, exploring royal heritage, ancient architecture, and spiritual traditions. This journey covers iconic landmarks, UNESCO World Heritage sites, and vibrant cultural experiences across Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, and Madhya Pradesh.

days.title: Arrival in Sawai Madhopur
days.description: Arrive at Sawai Madhopur, the gateway to Ranthambore National Park. Spend the evening relaxing and preparing for the adventure ahead with a local dinner featuring Rajasthani cuisine.

days.title: Sawai Madhopur – Ranthambore Safari
days.description: Embark on a morning and evening safari in Ranthambore National Park, home to Bengal tigers and diverse wildlife. Visit the historic Ranthambore Fort, a UNESCO site, perched atop a hill with panoramic views.

days.title: Jaipur – Pink City Exploration
days.description: Explore Jaipur’s iconic landmarks including the Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Stroll through bustling bazaars to shop for traditional handicrafts and jewelry.

days.title: Jaipur – Cultural Heritage
days.description: Visit Jantar Mantar, an astronomical observatory, and Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a cultural evening with folk dances and Rajasthani folk music performance.

days.title: Agra – Taj Mahal & Fort
days.description: Marvel at the Taj Mahal at sunrise, followed by a visit to Agra Fort. Explore the intricate marble work and Mughal architecture that define these UNESCO World Heritage sites.

days.title: Gwalior – Fort & Temples
days.description: Discover Gwalior Fort, one of India’s largest forts, and the intricately carved Sas Bahu Temples. Visit the Jai Vilas Palace to see its grand Durbar Hall and chandeliers.

days.title: Khajuraho – Temples of Love
days.description: Explore the UNESCO-listed Khajuraho Group of Monuments, renowned for their intricate carvings depicting life and love. Attend the evening light and sound show to learn about the temples' history.

days.title: Varanasi – Spiritual Ganges
days.description: Witness the sacred rituals along the Ganges River in Varanasi, including the Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat. Visit the Kashi Vishwanath Temple and explore the labyrinthine alleys of the old city.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Transfer to Delhi for your onward journey. Depending on flight schedules, enjoy a brief city tour or visit Humayun’s Tomb or Qutub Minar before departing.

INBOUND-56.overview: Embark on a cultural journey through India's royal heritage, exploring majestic forts, palaces, and desert landscapes. This 8-day tour traces the historic Deccan region, blending history, architecture, and local traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Agra – Taj Mahal at dusk
days.description: Arrive in Agra and check into your heritage hotel. Enjoy a mesmerizing sunset view of the iconic Taj Mahal, followed by a light and sound show narrating its history.

days.title: Agra – Mughal wonders and forts
days.description: Visit the Agra Fort and the ethereal Taj Mahal at sunrise. Explore the intricate marble work of Itmad-ud-Daulah’s Tomb before heading to the bustling local markets for souvenirs.

days.title: Sawai Madhopur – Ranthambore safari
days.description: Travel to Sawai Madhopur and embark on a thrilling jeep safari in Ranthambore National Park, home to Bengal tigers and historic ruins. Enjoy a cultural dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Udaipur – City of lakes and palaces
days.description: Explore the grand City Palace, serene Lake Pichola, and the romantic Jag Mandir Island. Witness a traditional Rajasthani puppet show and stroll through the vibrant bazaars.

days.title: Jodhpur – Blue city and Mehrangarh
days.description: Discover the towering Mehrangarh Fort and its museum. Walk through the blue-painted streets of the Old City and visit Jaswant Thada, a stunning marble cenotaph.

days.title: Jaisalmer – Golden desert and forts
days.description: Tour the golden-hued Jaisalmer Fort and the intricately carved Jain temples. Enjoy a camel ride in the Thar Desert at sunset, followed by a traditional Rajasthani dinner under the stars.

days.title: Jaipur – Pink City heritage walk
days.description: Visit the Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and the astronomical Jantar Mantar. Experience a heritage walk in the old city, exploring bazaars and local crafts before a cultural evening.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Transfer to Delhi for your onward journey. Enjoy a farewell breakfast at a heritage café before heading to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-65.overview: A 7-day immersive tour exploring the pristine coral reefs, turquoise waters, and lush landscapes of the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. Starting in Port Blair, the itinerary includes visits to Havelock Island and Neil Island, offering a mix of adventure, relaxation, and cultural experiences.

days.title: Arrival in Port Blair
days.description: Arrive at Veer Savarkar International Airport in Port Blair. Check-in at a hotel and relax. Visit the Cellular Jail, a historic colonial prison, and attend the evening sound and light show. Explore local markets for souvenirs.

days.title: Port Blair to Havelock Island
days.description: Morning ferry to Havelock Island. Check-in at a beach resort. Spend the afternoon at Radhanagar Beach, one of Asia's best beaches. Enjoy snorkeling or swimming in the clear waters. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Exploring Havelock Island
days.description: Full-day excursion to Elephant Beach for snorkeling and water activities. Visit Kalapathar Beach for its scenic beauty and natural rock formations. Return to the resort for a relaxing evening.

days.title: Havelock Island to Neil Island
days.description: Morning ferry to Neil Island. Check-in at a beachfront resort. Visit Sitapur Beach, known for its white sands and calm waters. Explore the local village and enjoy fresh seafood at a beachside restaurant.

days.title: Exploring Neil Island
days.description: Full-day tour of Neil Island's attractions, including Bharatpur Beach, Laxmanpur Beach, and the natural bridge. Enjoy snorkeling at Ramnagar Beach. Evening at leisure to relax or explore the island.

days.title: Neil Island to Port Blair
days.description: Morning ferry back to Port Blair. Visit the Chidiya Tapu for sunset views and birdwatching. Check-in at a hotel and enjoy a farewell dinner at a local restaurant.

days.title: Departure from Port Blair
days.description: Morning at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-66.overview: Experience the breathtaking natural beauty, vibrant culture, and serene landscapes of Meghalaya, known as the 'Abode of Clouds.' This 7-day itinerary covers the scenic hill stations of Shillong and Jowai, with a return to Guwahati for departure.

days.title: Arrival in Shillong
days.description: Arrive at Shillong, the capital of Meghalaya. Check into your hotel and explore the local markets like Bara Bazaar. Visit Ward's Lake for a peaceful evening stroll. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Exploring Shillong
days.description: Visit the famous Elephant Falls and the serene Shillong Peak for panoramic views. Explore the Don Bosco Museum to learn about the region's culture and history. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong to Jowai
days.description: Drive to Jowai, the cultural heart of the Jaintia Hills. Visit the scenic Thadlaskein Lake and the ancient Nartiang Monoliths. Explore local markets and enjoy the Jaintia cuisine. Overnight in Jowai.

days.title: Jowai Exploration
days.description: Visit the sacred Jowai Presbyterian Church and the picturesque Myntdu View Point. Explore the local villages and interact with the warm Khasi and Jaintia communities. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Jowai.

days.title: Jowai to Shillong
days.description: Return to Shillong and visit the captivating Mawsmai Cave and the living root bridges of Mawlynnong, the cleanest village in Asia. Enjoy the lush greenery and unique architecture. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong to Guwahati
days.description: Drive to Guwahati, the gateway to Northeast India. Visit the Kamakhya Temple and explore the city's vibrant markets. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Guwahati.

days.title: Departure from Guwahati
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey.

INBOUND-68.overview: A 10-day journey through the scenic hills and cultural gems of Meghalaya, starting in Shillong and ending in Guwahati. Experience living root bridges, waterfalls, caves, and tribal heritage in the 'Abode of Clouds'.

days.title: Arrival in Shillong
days.description: Arrive at Shillong, the capital of Meghalaya. Check into your hotel and spend the evening exploring local markets like Bara Bazaar. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong Sightseeing
days.description: Visit Ward's Lake, Lady Hydari Park, and the Shillong Peak for panoramic views. Explore the Don Bosco Museum to learn about the region's culture and biodiversity. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Shillong to Cherrapunji
days.description: Drive to Cherrapunji (approx. 2 hours). Visit Nohkalikai Falls, the tallest plunge waterfall in India, and the living root bridges at Nongriat village. Explore Mawsmai Cave. Overnight in Cherrapunji.

days.title: Cherrapunji Exploration
days.description: Visit the double-decker living root bridge at Umshiang. Explore the Eco Park and David Scott Trail for scenic hikes. Evening at leisure to enjoy the cool climate.

days.title: Cherrapunji to Mawlyngbna
days.description: Drive to Mawlyngbna (approx. 3 hours), a serene eco-village. Enjoy nature walks, visit the Mawlyngbna Living Root Bridge, and experience local Khasi culture. Overnight in Mawlyngbna.

days.title: Mawlyngbna Adventure
days.description: Engage in outdoor activities like trekking, village walks, and birdwatching. Visit nearby waterfalls and enjoy the tranquil surroundings. Evening bonfire and cultural performance.

days.title: Mawlyngbna to Jowai
days.description: Drive to Jowai (approx. 2 hours), the cultural heart of the Jaintia Hills. Visit the Jowai Lake, Thadlaskein Lake, and the Jaintia Museum. Overnight in Jowai.

days.title: Jowai Exploration
days.description: Explore the Nartiang Durga Temple and the monoliths of Nartiang. Visit the Ialong Park and enjoy the scenic views of the Jaintia Hills. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Jowai to Guwahati
days.description: Drive to Guwahati (approx. 4 hours). Visit the Kamakhya Temple and the Assam State Museum. Evening at the banks of the Brahmaputra River. Overnight in Guwahati.

days.title: Departure from Guwahati
days.description: Morning at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-70.overview: A 12-day journey through the scenic landscapes of Himachal Pradesh, featuring colonial charm in Shimla, adventure in Manali, the rugged beauty of Spiti Valley, the serene Chandratal Lake, and the serene hills of Narkanda.

days.title: Arrival in Shimla
days.description: Arrive in Shimla, the capital of Himachal Pradesh. Explore the Ridge and Mall Road, visit the Christ Church, and enjoy the colonial architecture. Overnight stay in Shimla.

days.title: Shimla Sightseeing
days.description: Visit Kufri for panoramic views, explore the Jakhu Temple, and stroll through the Viceregal Lodge. Evening free for local shopping. Overnight in Shimla.

days.title: Shimla to Manali
days.description: Drive from Shimla to Manali (approx. 7-8 hours). En route, stop at Kullu for lunch and visit the Hidimba Devi Temple. Arrive in Manali, check-in, and relax. Overnight in Manali.

days.title: Manali Local Exploration
days.description: Explore Manali’s attractions including the Old Manali Market, Hadimba Temple, and the Solang Valley for adventure activities like paragliding or ropeway. Overnight in Manali.

days.title: Manali to Kaza
days.description: Long drive from Manali to Kaza (approx. 10-12 hours) via Rohtang Pass (permit required) and Gramphoo. Arrive in Kaza, check-in, and rest. Overnight in Kaza.

days.title: Kaza Sightseeing
days.description: Visit Key Monastery, Dhankar Monastery, and local villages. Explore the stark beauty of Spiti Valley. Overnight in Kaza.

days.title: Kaza to Chandratal Lake
days.description: Drive to Chandratal Lake (approx. 4-5 hours), a stunning high-altitude lake known for its crescent shape. Camp overnight near the lake under the starry sky.

days.title: Chandratal Lake to Kaza
days.description: Morning at leisure to soak in the lake’s beauty. Drive back to Kaza (approx. 4-5 hours). Overnight in Kaza.

days.title: Kaza to Narkanda
days.description: Drive from Kaza to Narkanda (approx. 8-9 hours) via Reckong Peo. En route, stop at Sangla Valley for scenic views. Arrive in Narkanda, check-in, and relax. Overnight in Narkanda.

days.title: Narkanda Sightseeing
days.description: Visit Hatu Peak for panoramic views, explore apple orchards, and enjoy nature walks. Evening free for local activities. Overnight in Narkanda.

days.title: Narkanda to Shimla
days.description: Drive from Narkanda to Shimla (approx. 6-7 hours). En route, stop at Tattapani for hot springs. Arrive in Shimla, check-in, and relax. Overnight in Shimla.

days.title: Departure from Shimla
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to Shimla Airport/Railway Station for departure.

INBOUND-TEST-01.overview: This 15-day tour explores Karnataka's cultural heritage and natural beauty before ending with Goa's serene beaches. Starting in Bangalore, it covers historic Mysore, lush Chikmagalur, Hampi's ruins, Badami's ancient caves, and concludes with Goa's vibrant coastal charm.

days.title: Arrival in Bangalore
days.description: Arrive in Bengaluru, check into your hotel, and relax after the journey. In the evening, explore MG Road for shopping and local cuisine or visit the bustling Brigade Road.

days.title: Bangalore sightseeing
days.description: Visit the iconic Bangalore Palace and the Vidhana Soudha. Spend the afternoon at Lalbagh Botanical Garden, known for its glasshouse and diverse plant species.

days.title: Bangalore to Mysore
days.description: Travel to Mysore (3 hours), stopping at Shivanasamudra Falls. Visit the Mysore Palace in the evening during the illuminated light show.

days.title: Mysore exploration
days.description: Explore the Mysore Zoo and the historic St. Philomena’s Church. Visit Brindavan Gardens in the evening for a musical fountain show.

days.title: Mysore to Chikmagalur
days.description: Drive to Chikmagalur (3.5 hours), passing coffee plantations. Visit the serene Hoysala temples at Amruthapura and Kalaseshwara.

days.title: Chikmagalur nature tour
days.description: Hike to Mullayanagiri peak, the highest in Karnataka. Explore the lush green landscapes of Bhadra Wildlife Sanctuary.

days.title: Chikmagalur to Hospet
days.description: Travel to Hospet (5 hours), stopping at Belur and Halebidu for their stunning Hoysala architecture. Check into a hotel near Hampi.

days.title: Hampi ruins exploration
days.description: Spend the day exploring the UNESCO-listed ruins of Hampi, including Virupaksha Temple and the Stone Chariot. Visit the sunset viewpoint at Matanga Hill.

days.title: Hampi to Badami
days.description: Drive to Badami (3 hours), visiting Aihole’s ancient temples en route. Check into a hotel near Badami caves.

days.title: Badami caves and temples
days.description: Explore the rock-cut Badami Cave Temples and the historic Agastya Lake. Visit the ancient Durga Temple and Pattadakal’s UNESCO sites.

days.title: Badami to Goa
days.description: Travel to Goa (7 hours), stopping at Dandeli for a short nature break. Arrive in North Goa and check into a beachside resort.

days.title: Goa beaches and markets
days.description: Relax at Baga Beach and explore the vibrant Anjuna Flea Market. Enjoy a beachside seafood dinner in the evening.

days.title: Goa cultural tour
days.description: Visit Old Goa’s churches like Basilica of Bom Jesus and Sé Cathedral. Explore Fontainhas, the Latin Quarter, in Panjim.

days.title: Goa water sports
days.description: Engage in water sports like parasailing or jet skiing at Palolem Beach. Spend the evening at a beach shack enjoying Goan feni and seafood.

days.title: Departure from Goa
days.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast at the resort before heading to the airport for your departure. Relish the memories of your Karnataka-Goa journey.

INBOUND-TEST-02.overview: Explore the iconic Golden Triangle of India, covering Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur over 7 days. Experience rich history, stunning architecture, vibrant culture, and royal heritage in these three vibrant cities.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi, the capital of India. Check into your hotel and rest. In the evening, visit India Gate and Rajpath for a glimpse of Delhi's colonial past and modern vibrancy. Enjoy dinner at a local restaurant.

days.title: Delhi Sightseeing - Old & New Delhi
days.description: Full day tour of Delhi. Visit Old Delhi landmarks like Jama Masjid, Chandni Chowk, and the Red Fort. In the afternoon, explore New Delhi highlights including Humayun's Tomb, Qutub Minar, and India Gate. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Travel to Agra
days.description: Morning drive to Agra (approx. 3-4 hours). Visit the Taj Mahal at sunset for a breathtaking view. Later, explore Agra Fort. Overnight stay in Agra.

days.title: Agra Sightseeing
days.description: Early morning visit to the Taj Mahal at sunrise. Then, visit Itmad-ud-Daulah (Baby Taj) and Mehtab Bagh for a serene view of the Taj. Afternoon free for local shopping or relaxation. Evening drive to Jaipur (approx. 5 hours).

days.title: Jaipur Sightseeing - Pink City
days.description: Full day tour of Jaipur. Visit Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, and local markets for handicrafts and textiles. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Jaipur Exploration & Departure
days.description: Morning visit to Albert Hall Museum or a local village tour. Afternoon free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Evening departure from Jaipur.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Depart from Jaipur. Safe travels!

INBOUND-TEST-03.overview: An 11-day spiritual journey tracing the footsteps of Buddha, from his birthplace in Lumbini to key sites of enlightenment, teaching, and nirvana across India and Nepal.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi, the capital of India. Check into your hotel and rest after your journey. In the evening, attend a welcome dinner and brief orientation about the tour.

days.title: Delhi to Varanasi
days.description: Morning flight to Varanasi. Explore the spiritual heart of India with visits to Dashashwamedh Ghat, Kashi Vishwanath Temple, and a boat ride on the Ganges at sunset. Overnight in Varanasi.

days.title: Varanasi to Bodhgaya
days.description: Morning flight to Gaya, then drive to Bodhgaya (approx. 1.5 hours). Visit the Mahabodhi Temple Complex, the Bodhi Tree, and the Great Buddha Statue. Evening meditation session. Overnight in Bodhgaya.

days.title: Bodhgaya Exploration
days.description: Full day in Bodhgaya. Visit monasteries from different Buddhist traditions, the Archaeological Museum, and participate in meditation or Dharma talks. Evening cultural program. Overnight in Bodhgaya.

days.title: Bodhgaya to Patna
days.description: Drive to Patna (approx. 6 hours). Visit the Patna Museum to see the Didarganj Yakshi and other artifacts. Explore Golghar and the Gandhi Maidan. Overnight in Patna.

days.title: Patna to Kushinagar
days.description: Drive to Kushinagar (approx. 5 hours). Visit Mahaparinirvana Temple, Ramabhar Stupa, and the Nirvana Stupa. Evening meditation near the stupa. Overnight in Kushinagar.

days.title: Kushinagar to Lumbini
days.description: Cross into Nepal and drive to Lumbini (approx. 2 hours). Visit the Maya Devi Temple, the sacred Bodhi Tree, and the monastic zone. Attend evening prayers at the World Peace Pagoda. Overnight in Lumbini.

days.title: Lumbini Exploration
days.description: Full day in Lumbini. Visit the Lumbini Monastic Zone, the International Research Institute, and participate in meditation sessions. Explore the surrounding monasteries. Overnight in Lumbini.

days.title: Lumbini to Sravasti
days.description: Drive back to India and proceed to Sravasti (approx. 5 hours). Visit Jetavana Monastery, Anathapindika Stupa, and the ancient ruins. Evening meditation at the stupa. Overnight in Sravasti.

days.title: Sravasti Exploration
days.description: Full day in Sravasti. Visit the Saheth-Maheth complex, the Angulimala Stupa, and participate in teachings or discussions. Evening cultural performance. Overnight in Sravasti.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Morning transfer to Lucknow airport for your onward journey. Tour concludes.

INBOUND-TEST-32.overview: Explore India's royal heritage through its magnificent forts and palaces, from the Shekhawati havelis to the grand palaces of Rajasthan. This 12-day journey traces the legacy of Rajput rulers, blending history, architecture, and culture across historic forts and heritage hotels.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Transfer to Neemrana
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to Neemrana Fort Palace, a 15th-century hilltop fort converted into a heritage hotel. Enjoy a relaxed evening with panoramic views of the Aravalli hills and a traditional Rajasthani welcome.

days.title: Neemrana – Explore the Fort Palace
days.description: Spend the day exploring Neemrana Fort Palace, including its palaces, waterfalls, and stepwells. Visit the nearby Neemrana Baori and enjoy cultural performances in the evening.

days.title: Neemrana to Mandawa – Heritage Walk
days.description: Drive to Mandawa, the heart of Shekhawati, and explore its ornate havelis like Mandawa Haveli and Murmuria Haveli. Enjoy a heritage walk through the painted streets and step into a bygone era.

days.title: Mandawa – Shekhawati Art Tour
days.description: Visit lesser-known havelis such as Jhunjhunwala Haveli and Gulab Rai Ladia Haveli. Learn about fresco art and traditional Rajasthani architecture from local guides.

days.title: Mandawa to Gajner – Desert Safari
days.description: Travel to Gajner and enjoy a camel safari in the Thar Desert. Visit Gajner Palace, a lakeside retreat of the Bikaner royal family, and explore its hunting lodge history.

days.title: Gajner to Rohet Garh – Village & Palace
days.description: Proceed to Rohet Garh and tour the 16th-century fort-palace. Visit the nearby Pichiyak village to experience rural Rajasthan and interact with local artisans.

days.title: Rohet Garh to Deogarh – Scenic Drive
days.description: Drive through scenic countryside to Deogarh and check into Deogarh Mahal, a restored 17th-century palace. Enjoy a sunset walk around the serene lake and village.

days.title: Deogarh – Palace & Local Crafts
days.description: Explore Deogarh Mahal’s interiors, including the Durbar Hall and royal chambers. Visit local pottery and textile workshops to see traditional craftsmanship.

days.title: Deogarh to Udaipur – City of Lakes
days.description: Travel to Udaipur and visit City Palace, Jagdish Temple, and the serene Lake Pichola. Enjoy a sunset boat ride and dinner at a rooftop restaurant.

days.title: Udaipur – Heritage & Culture
days.description: Explore the lesser-known Jagdish Chowk and Saheliyon-ki-Bari. Visit the Bagore Ki Haveli for a cultural evening with folk dances and puppet shows.

days.title: Udaipur to Bundi – Hidden Gem
days.description: Drive to Bundi and tour the Taragarh Fort and stepwells like Raniji ki Baori. Explore the narrow bazaars and admire the blue-painted houses.

days.title: Bundi to Jaipur – Pink City Arrival
days.description: Travel to Jaipur and visit the Amber Fort and Hawa Mahal. Enjoy a farewell dinner at a heritage property, reflecting on the royal journey through India.

INBOUND-TEST-37.overview: A 12-day cultural and tribal journey through Odisha, exploring ancient temples, coastal towns, and indigenous tribal communities. The tour begins in Bhubaneswar, the temple city, and traverses through Puri, coastal Gopalpur, tribal heartland Rayagada, Jeypore's royal heritage, and concludes in Visakhapatnam.

days.title: Arrival in Bhubaneswar
days.description: Arrive at Bhubaneswar airport or railway station. Check-in at a heritage hotel. Evening visit to Lingaraj Temple (one of India's oldest temples). Overnight in Bhubaneswar.

days.title: Bhubaneswar – The Temple City
days.description: Full-day sightseeing of ancient temples: Mukteshwar, Rajarani, and Parasurameshwar. Visit the Odisha State Museum. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Bhubaneswar.

days.title: Bhubaneswar to Puri
days.description: Drive to Puri (~60 km). Visit the iconic Jagannath Temple and Puri Beach. Explore the local markets. Overnight in Puri.

days.title: Puri – Konark – Chandrabhaga
days.description: Morning visit to the Sun Temple in Konark. Afternoon at Chandrabhaga Beach. Return to Puri. Overnight in Puri.

days.title: Puri to Gopalpur On Sea
days.description: Drive to Gopalpur (~150 km). Relax at the serene beach. Visit the historic Gopalpur Lighthouse. Overnight in Gopalpur.

days.title: Gopalpur to Rayagada
days.description: Drive to Rayagada (~200 km). En route, visit tribal villages and waterfalls like Baghalpur. Overnight in Rayagada.

days.title: Rayagada – Tribal Experience
days.description: Explore tribal culture with visits to Dongria Kondh or Saura villages. Attend a tribal dance performance. Overnight in Rayagada.

days.title: Rayagada to Jeypore
days.description: Drive to Jeypore (~120 km). Visit the Jeypore Palace and local markets. Overnight in Jeypore.

days.title: Jeypore – Tribal Villages & Waterfalls
days.description: Visit nearby tribal villages like Bonda and Didayi. Explore waterfalls such as Duduma. Overnight in Jeypore.

days.title: Jeypore to Visakhapatnam
days.description: Drive to Visakhapatnam (~250 km). Visit Kailasagiri and the beach promenade. Overnight in Visakhapatnam.

days.title: Visakhapatnam – Cultural & Coastal Exploration
days.description: Visit the Submarine Museum, Kanya Kumari Beach, and the local fish market. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Visakhapatnam.

days.title: Departure from Visakhapatnam
days.description: Morning at leisure. Transfer to the airport or railway station for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-18.overview: A spiritual journey to the Kumbh Mela Special 2027 in Nashik, featuring sacred rituals, cultural experiences, and divine gatherings.

days.title: Arrival in Nashik & Evening Aarti
days.description: Arrive in Nashik, check-in at the designated accommodation. Attend the evening Ganga Aarti at the Godavari Ghat, followed by a cultural welcome dinner.

days.title: Kumbh Mela Darshan & Sacred Bath
days.description: Participate in the early morning Shahi Snan (Royal Bath) at the Kumbh Mela grounds. Explore the spiritual stalls, attend discourses by saints, and enjoy the vibrant festival atmosphere.

days.title: Spiritual Exploration & Cultural Performances
days.description: Visit the Sita Gufa, Kapila Muni Temple, and other sacred sites in Nashik. In the evening, witness traditional folk performances and devotional music at the Kumbh Mela.

days.title: Departure & Final Blessings
days.description: Morning visit to Trimbakeshwar Jyotirlinga for final prayers. Post-lunch, proceed to the airport/railway station for departure.
